programme.title: Reggie Perrin: Episode 3
programme.desc: Reggie enjoys teaching at Nicola's school, in his search to find a new focus in his life. He invites the class to spend a day at Groomtech with disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Reggie Perrin: Episode 4
programme.desc: When Reggie goes to Helsinki on a business trip with Jasmine, his marriage to Nicola faces its sternest test. Meanwhile Chris has concerns that Reggie is faltering.

programme.title: Reggie Perrin: Episode 1
programme.desc: After cracking up in front of his colleagues at a sales conference, Reggie's disappeared to the beach. But what should he do next? Walk out to sea, or start a new life? Without Reggie, Groomtech is in big trouble.

programme.title: Reggie Perrin: Episode 2
programme.desc: Reggie continues his search for a fulfilling new career, but money worries are snapping at his heels. The Perrin's discover they have a new next door neighbour.

programme.title: Reggie Perrin: Episode 3
programme.desc: Reggie is the new boss at Groomtech. With the freedom to do what he wants, Reggie decides to have some fun, and introduce a new kind of product. But Nicola is feeling neglected, and is grateful for the attention of her new neighbour.

programme.title: Reggie Perrin: Episode 4
programme.desc: Whilst Reggie is busy working on his new Grot product range, David reveals his true colours to Nicola at the swimming baths. William is getting increasingly desperate in his attempts to get out of the wedding.

programme.title: Reggie Perrin: Episode 5
programme.desc: With Grot a huge success, Reggie has a difficult choice to make at Groomtech. Meanwhile, his attempts to make things up with Nicola lead to a shocking discovery.

programme.title: Reggie Perrin: Episode 1
programme.desc: Reggie Perrin is feeling frustrated and alienated after ten years working at Groomtech. With his wife Nicola too busy for him, he becomes besotted with his new colleague Jasmine.

programme.title: Reggie Perrin: Episode 2
programme.desc: With Reggie's mother and Nicola's dad interfering in his marriage, and his inability to get on with people at work, Reggie Perrin finds himself taking a step too far with Jasmine.

programme.title: Reggie Perrin: Episode 3
programme.desc: Reggie enjoys teaching at Nicola's school, in his search to find a new focus in his life. He invites the class to spend a day at Groomtech with disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Reggie Perrin: Episode 4
programme.desc: When Reggie goes to Helsinki on a business trip with Jasmine, his marriage to Nicola faces its sternest test. Meanwhile Chris has concerns that Reggie is faltering.

programme.title: Reggie Perrin: Episode 5
programme.desc: Chris seeks Reggie's help as he struggles to convince the Groomtech board he is the right man for the job.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood Innocence
programme.desc: War hero Carl Taylor is beaten to death in the back of an empty semi truck, for no apparent reason. Lt Joe Kenda notices an unusual pattern in the victim’s head wounds.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Eyes Wide Shut
programme.desc: A park ranger discovers the corpse of amateur boxer Corey Edge floating in a shallow creek. Kenda learns the victim had ties to the criminal underworld, and investigates a rogue’s gallery of hustlers.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Comes Knocking
programme.desc: Neighbors are aghast when Ernestine Addison and her teen son Bobby are gunned down in cold blood. The case heats up when Kenda receives word that the killer’s murderous rampage isn’t over just yet.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Poker Face
programme.desc: A group of friends discover the corpse of entrepreneur Jamie Foster hidden under a blanket. Kenda e discovers that Foster’s business put him in close quarters with a host of unsavory characters.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bad Things Come in Threes
programme.desc: When two young mothers are gunned down behind a crowded bar, Kenda has to first determine who was the intended target and who was collateral damage.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Snitch
programme.desc: When officers respond to a shooting , they discover the body of a young man they know all to well -- police informant Jimmie Stevenson. it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda to determine who pulled the trigger.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Master Key
programme.desc: When a pregnant mother and her two young sons are brutally slain, pressure mounts for the CSPD to catch the cold-blooded monster who did it.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: #1 Suspect
programme.desc: Lt. Joe Kenda must somehow solve a stranger-on-stranger crime with just a composite sketch of the killer and a mysterious bouquet of flowers.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Dexter and Nasir
programme.desc: A Chicago art teacher wants to unify her adopted Rottweiler/shepherd’s dual personality. Singer Patti LaBelle is afraid of her guard dog, an aggressive 150-pound South African boerboel.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Cesar Goes to Vegas
programme.desc: Usually, Cirque du Soleil has everything under control, but several of the performer's animals are in trouble, so Cesar heads to Vegas to help out.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Harley, Annabelle and Memphis
programme.desc: Cesar gives three socially awkward pups some boundaries: a Lab in constant movement, a shrieking Australian Shepherd and Weimaraner with an eating disorder.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Tigger and Dan
programme.desc: Cesar comes in to help twins with their biting Chihuahua-Pomeranian mix. A Labrador retriever quickly takes to training to become a hunting dog but has a growing aggressive streak.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Eppie, Lady, and Snoopy
programme.desc: A Beagle with a passion for boogie boarding, a Dalmatian/German shepherd dangerously protective of her owner; Lab/Beagle mix that became aggressive after moving to a new area.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Buddy, Tiger & Roxy, and Booker
programme.desc: Cesar tries to rehabilitate two Rottie pups before they grow into dangerous attack dogs. Buddy, has a bad habit of biting. A Visla cowers and cringes at the sights and sounds of the city.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Rana & Ruby
programme.desc: Scared of everything, Ruby the Vischla deals with her neuroses by biting. At the same time, Rana barks every time bread pops in the toaster, or when the microwave goes off, or when the phone rings.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Optimus & Gigi and Sissy
programme.desc: Cesar lends his hand reforming Great Dane Optimus, who has a biting attitude, and Sissy, a fearful Shepherd mix rescued from a terrible hoarding situation.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Eats Dirt/Extreme Toenails
programme.desc: Kristie has eaten dirt every day for the last 30 years, consuming more than five tons since her addiction began. Meanwhile, Ayanna is addicted to growing her toenails.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: My Crazy Obsession Christmas Spcl 1
programme.desc: My Crazy Obsession: Christmas Collection takes you inside the lives of extreme collectors who have taken holiday decorating to the max. For these obsessed collectors, it's Christmas year round.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Raggedy Ann_A Rat's Tale
programme.desc: Chantal’s 19 pet rats are more than just pets; she considers them her children. Robyn loves to share her obsession with Raggedy Ann and she tries to convert new Raggedy believers.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Casting / Psychics
programme.desc: Profiled are Kevin, who constantly covers his body in plaster casts even though he is not injured, and Melissa who is incapable of making a decision without a consulting a psychic.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Grown-Up Baby
programme.desc: Stanley, 31, has been obsessed with being an adult baby for the past 18 years. Every day he wears footie pajamas, eats baby food, wears a diaper and sleeps in a crib.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Spin Cycle_Newborn Dolls
programme.desc: Fred and Robert have a rare collection of vintage washing machines. They’ve over $40,000 to compile this one-of-a-kind collection. Lynn has created over 1,800 life-like vinyl newborn dolls.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Ventriloquist/Cat Lady
programme.desc: April's addiction to her puppets has gotten so strong she can't go anywhere without them. Debbie is severely allergic to cats, but has over twenty of them, leaving her in isolation.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Eats Detergent/Strongman
programme.desc: 19-year-old Tempestt eats detergent up to seven times a day, not to mention the soap she eats in the shower. Meanwhile, Jeff is addicted to strongman competitions training up to six hours a day.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: My Crazy Obsession Pilot
programme.desc: My Collection Obsession takes you deep inside the world of four of the country’s most obsessed collectors each taking their material obsession to jaw-dropping extremes.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Rampant Rats/Extreme Fingernails
programme.desc: Theresa has more than 60 pet hairless rats that are taking over her apartment. Jazz has been growing her fingernails for 22 years. Her longest nail is two feet long, and she calls them her children.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Wears Diapers/Eats Dryer Sheets
programme.desc: For Riley, there's nothing like the comfort of wearing a warm, wet diaper. She lives as an adult baby to escape the stresses of life. And Charmissa chews on dryer sheets for up to 10 hours a day.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Hair Puller/Shoe Fanatic
programme.desc: Showcases a woman addicted to shoes, while another is addicted to pulling her hair and eating the follicle.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Airline Addict_Crazy for Capybaras
programme.desc: Anthony has been collecting aviation memorabilia since he was 5. Melanie is crazy about her pet capybara, Gari, taking him for walks and teaching him tricks.

programme.title: Buying Alaska: Guys Getaway
programme.desc: David Parks and Chris Erickson are best friends, and professional handymen. They want to buy a weekend getaway house in the wilds of Alaska, but they don’t want to spend a lot of money.

programme.title: Buying Alaska: Juneau Waterfront
programme.desc: Chris and Heidi are marine adventurers who want Alaska’s marine wildlife right out their front door. They want to buy a home on the coveted waterfront of the oceanside city of Juneau.

programme.title: Buying Alaska: Tiny Homes, Big Mountain
programme.desc: Pete and Martha have lived and worked in some of the wildest locations in the U.S. In Alaska they want an isolated home with views of the tallest peak in North America - Mount McKinley.

programme.title: Buying Alaska: Dollars Or Drains
programme.desc: Texas native Colby wants an affordable home, but he’s in for a shock because, in Alaska, that means a dry cabin – with no running water. He doesn’t know anything about life without plumbing.

programme.title: Buying Alaska: Dangerous Trails
programme.desc: Brandon and Hanna want a home on an isolated lake far into the Alaskan wild, where there’s no way in but off-roading through trails of mud or landing on water.

programme.title: Buying Alaska: No Roads In
programme.desc: Dave and Wendy want a remote cabin where they can escape to the Alaskan frontier way of life, places so hidden that the only way there is by off-road vehicle and no outhouse is safe from hungry bears.

programme.title: Buying Alaska: Jaws, Claws & Beaver Fever
programme.desc: Shane and Erica want a home in the Alaskan wild, where it’s so remote, the only way in is by a monster 8-wheeler. Homeowners beware! Bears attack the properties and beavers infect the drinking water.

programme.title: Buying Bayou: Hot Tubs and Gators
programme.desc: Duck, Lathan, & Flip are tired of traveling each weekend to their favorite place to enjoy bayou living. They’re willing to do anything to buy a home if they can hunt gators right out their back door.

programme.title: Buying Bayou: Lakes for the Champ
programme.desc: “Catfish” Jack Clampit and his daughter, Amanda, love hand-grabbing catfish, so he and Amanda are searching for a camp that will accommodate both their families…and their appetite for catfish.

programme.title: Buying Bayou: Starter Homes
programme.desc: Josh McIntire is an avid duck hunter and fisherman and he hopes to find a house where he can do just that. He’s bringing his life-long best friend, Hanna, for guidance.

programme.title: Buying Bayou: Rolling on the River
programme.desc: Bryan Fassbender and Stephanie Robichaux are self described work-a-holics who just want to have a weekend houseboat on the Pearl River, and are willing to live off the grid.

programme.title: Buying Bayou: Boaters Beware
programme.desc: Matt and Laurie aren’t your ordinary couple looking for a turnkey home. They love fixing places up. They look at three unusual homes on Louisiana oxbows.

programme.title: Buying Bayou: Storm Deals
programme.desc: David and Jackie love bayou life in Mississippi. With their two sons away at college, they’re looking to downsize on the water. They’re looking for a fixer upper they can make their own.

programme.title: Buying Bayou: Hurricane Homes
programme.desc: Jeff and Amelia Harding cruise the Mississippi Gulf Coast in search of a new house. Amelia lost her home in Katrina, so they’re scouring the coast for a house that can stand up to a hurricane.

programme.title: Baywatch: Cretin of the Shallows
programme.desc: Several people are murdered at the beach by a mysterious man in ghoulish make-up and Eddie is knocked unconscious by what he describes as a "cretin." Eddie's report is met with skepticism until the identity of the killer is dramatically revealed.

programme.title: Baywatch: Shelter Me
programme.desc: During a tropical storm, Eddie and Shauni take refuge in the Pomeroy's loft, turning a cold night into the start of a hot romance. In the downpour, two escaped convicts shoot Garner, then break into Baywatch headquarters and take everyone hostage.

programme.title: Baywatch: The Reunion
programme.desc: Craig gets jealous when Mitch reunites with his and Craig’s old flame. Meanwhile, Eddie buys a classic Mustang for cheap, only to get arrested for possession of a stolen car.

programme.title: Baywatch: Armored Car
programme.desc: Jill teams up with Trevor to win a beach volleyball tournament, but all she really wants is to beat her former lover's team. Eddie and Shauni team up to rescue a young girl trapped in an armored car that topples off the pier into the ocean.

programme.title: Baywatch: Home Cort
programme.desc: Mitch gets a surprise visit from his old, mischievous Navy S.E.A.L. buddy and ex-Baywatch lifeguard, John Cort, adding serious problems in their already complicated relationship. And Shauni and Jill fight a battle of the sexes against a shady vendor.

programme.title: Baywatch: We Need a Vacation
programme.desc: Craig, Cort and Eddie take a road trip to Mexico, but their vacation south of the border turns ugly when they tangle with an angry American tourist. Meanwhile, Captian Thorpe becomes Mitch's uninvited house guest. Hobie develops a crush on Shauni.

programme.title: Baywatch: Muddy Waters
programme.desc: Cort and Eddie train lifeguards at a water park, but someone is vandalizing the waterslides, putting people's lives in danger. Meanwhile, Captain Thorpe wants Shauni fired for posing in a provocative calendar.

programme.title: Baywatch: Snake Eyes
programme.desc: Eddie and Cort happen upon an illegal gambling ship. Meanwhile, Mitch begins to spend more time with Hobie's English teacher – a liaison that embarrasses Hobie beyond belief.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 6

programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Witness to Murder, Roulette Wheel, The Phrenologist's Head, The Bridge, The Cigar Box.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 8
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Caitlin's Candle, The Flower Jury, The Mentor, The Old Bike, The Music Teacher.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 13

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 5

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 8165
programme.desc: The reality of her daughter’s situation hits hard when Shauna visits Flo in jail. Ridge expresses his disbelief towards Brooke’s explanation and Thomas’s actions.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 8166
programme.desc: Shauna comes clean to Quinn while imploring her friend to help free Flo from prison. Ridge becomes furious when he happens upon Liam scorning an unconscious Thomas.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 8167
programme.desc: The Forresters, Logans and Spencers struggle with whether or not Thomas will survive his injuries. Detective Sanchez hits Ridge and Brooke hard with questions about Thomas’s accident.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 8168
programme.desc: Sally and Wyatt become playful after sharing a tender and unexpected kiss. Brooke worries as Thomas begins to answer Det. Sanchez’s questions about his accident.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 8169
programme.desc: While Shauna visits her in jail, Flo comes to comprehend the immense impact of her actions. Brooke is in utter disbelief that Ridge doesn’t believe her story about Thomas.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 8170
programme.desc: On a warpath for answers, Ridge explodes at Flo declaring that she will get what she deserves. Stunned by Brooke’s confession, Bill pays an unexpected visit to Thomas in the hospital.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 8171
programme.desc: The Logan sisters band together in an effort to help Brooke in her time of trouble. Ridge is disconcerted when Det. Sanchez brings up Thomas and his involvement in the death of Emma Barber.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 8172
programme.desc: Dollar Bill takes action to help Brooke find cold, hard evidence against Thomas. Ridge lambastes Thomas as his son recounts to him the series of events on the night that Emma died.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 8173
programme.desc: Steffy rages against Thomas for the harm he’s done to her, Hope, Liam, Beth and Kelly. Ridge unexpectedly finds himself holding the keys to Flo and Thomas’s futures.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 8174
programme.desc: Ridge makes a difficult decision based upon what he thinks is best for his son, Thomas. As Steffy unleashes her fury on Flo, Brooke makes her feelings about Thomas crystal clear to Donna and Katie.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 8175
programme.desc: Trouble brews in paradise when Ridge explains to Brooke the deal he made for Flo and Thomas. Sally Spectra puts her self-worth on full display to Wyatt who admires her integrity and beauty.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 8176
programme.desc: The fight between Brooke and Ridge over Thomas ends with him leaving and her reeling. Shauna pays an unwelcome visit to Brooke, who pushes Shauna out of her house.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 8177
programme.desc: Overhearing her with Wyatt, Sally goes off on Flo for her con against Wyatt and the Forrester family. Grateful for the kindness he showed Flo, Shauna saddles up next to a very drunk Ridge at the Bikini Bar.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 7929
programme.desc: Determined not to lose his son, Bill instructs Justin to do whatever it takes to ensure that he wins the custody battle. Zoe gets flirtatious when Xander reveals how his new job came to be.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 7930
programme.desc: Following a heated exchange, Bill and Ridge each take next steps to ensure the custody battle ends in their favor. Liam and Wyatt consider their relationship with Bill and debate whether he deserves to win custody of their brother Will.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 7931
programme.desc: As Justin and Bill plan their legal strategy, Thorne reveals a new strategy of his own to Katie. While Brooke worries about secretly meeting with Bill, Ridge holds his own secret meeting... with Judge McMullen.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 7932
programme.desc: Unbeknownst to Brooke, Ridge is keeping his own secret from her about his relationship with Judge McMullen. Realizing he must take matters into his own hands, Bill pays an unexpected visit to Katie.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 7933
programme.desc: Excited to become a family before their court date, Katie and Thorne walk down the aisle to say I do. Justin becomes concerned that Bill will do something foolish on Katie’s wedding day.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Delusion
programme.desc: A man with a rare blood type is unwilling to donate his blood in order to save a girl's life, knowing that if he does he will be tormented by supernatural visions of her future.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Ordeal on Locust Street
programme.desc: A seemingly normal family is hiding a terrible secret: their son has the features of a deformed, fish-like monster.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Brainwave
programme.desc: Aboard a United States ship in Japanese waters during World War II, Captain Fielding is critically injured.

programme.title: Creature from the Haunted Sea
programme.desc: In this spoof of horror and spy thrillers, American gangster Renzo Capetto decides to kill members of his bungling crew and blame their deaths on a legendary sea creature. What he doesn't know is that the creature is actually out there!

programme.title: Castle of the Living Dead
programme.desc: A troupe of travelling players are invited by Count Drago to perform at his castle. Ignoring the warning given by a local mystic, they accept - and begin to die, horrifically, one by one!

programme.title: Attack of the Killer Tomatoes
programme.desc: A group of scientists band together to save the world from mutated tomatoes that KILL! (1978)

programme.title: Surrounded
programme.desc: To boost viewership of their popular travel vlog, a group of millennial friends document their illegal snorkelling trip to a beautiful cove.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Til Death Do Us
programme.desc: Bob gets conned into buying a cemetery plot for Margaret as a surprise 15th wedding anniversary gift.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Wedding
programme.desc: Cookie and Melvin invite Bob and Margaret to the wedding of their goddaughter, Tiffany.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Fish at the Bat
programme.desc: Bob gets cajoled into joining his office softball team.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Over-Exposed
programme.desc: Margaret accidentally picks up her neighbour's photos at the pharmacy.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Book Club
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret join a book club in the hopes of expanding their tiny social horizon.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: On Location
programme.desc: A film crew sets up shop on Bob and Margaret's street, giving them a small and unsavory taste of fame and fortune.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Cottage Country
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret get invited up to the cottage of Dr. Yoselheiffer, President of the Canadian Council of Dentists.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Driving Bob
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret have put it off for too long. They need to get their Canadian drivers' licenses.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Undefined Border
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret go cross-border shopping in the United States.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Age Before Beauty
programme.desc: Margaret gets a new hairstyle but Bob doesn't even notice.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: New Lease on Life
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret have near-death experience when Bob nearly crashes their car.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Jury Duty
programme.desc: Margaret gets called to Jury Duty but Bob has planned a holiday for them and begs her to get herself excused.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Player
programme.desc: Bob attends a personal finance seminar to help him get his hopeless financial house in order.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Getaway
programme.desc: Margaret is nominated for the Golden Arch Support award for outstanding service in the field of footcare.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Mummy's Boy
programme.desc: Bobs mother is coming all the way from England to visit him.

programme.title: The Nanny: What the Butler Sang
programme.desc: Maxwell hears Niles singing and asks him to sing for his backers' audition. Meanwhile, Fran clashes with her sister Nadine.

programme.title: The Nanny: A Kiss is Just a Kiss
programme.desc: Fran and Maggie (Fran Drescher, Nicholle Tom) enter a contest where the winner appears on the cover of a Billy Ray Cyrus album.
programme.sub-title: A Kiss is Just a Kiss

programme.title: The Nanny: Strange Bedfellows
programme.desc: After attending a retirement party for a friend (Tyne Daly), Fran (Fran Drescher) stumbles into bed with Maxwell (Charles Shaughnessy). With Daniel Davis.

programme.title: The Nanny: The Chatterbox
programme.desc: Maggie receives a party invitation so Fran takes her to her favorite beauty salon. Fran gets a job there for an actress who loses a Sheffield audition.

programme.title: The Nanny: Fran Gets Mugged
programme.desc: When Fran and Brighton (Fran Drescher, Benjamin Salisbury) are mugged in Central Park, the perpetrator (Alex Nevil) gets more than a purse.

programme.title: The Nanny: A Fine Family Feud
programme.desc: Fran's (Fran Drescher) exciting plans for Maggie's (Nicholle Tom) Sweet Sixteen party go awry because of family antagonisms. With Renee Taylor.

programme.title: The Nanny: Franny and the Professor
programme.desc: C.C.'s brother (Michael McKean) bets her (Lauren Lane) that he can help Fran (Fran Drescher) qualify as a "Jeopardy!" contestant.

programme.title: The Nanny: Pen Pal
programme.desc: Fran must overcome many hurdles when her pen pal (Florence Griffith-Joyner) of 25 years wants to meet her.

programme.title: The Nanny: The Dope Diamond
programme.desc: Fran (Fran Drescher) accepts a marriage proposal from a doctor (Ian Buchanan), but the groom-to-be vanishes. With Charles Shaughnessy.

programme.title: The Nanny: Val's Apartment
programme.desc: Fran (Fran Drescher) decides to share an apartment with Val (Rachel Chagall) when she feels stressed out. With Charles Shaughnessy, Daniel Davis.

programme.title: The Nanny: Oy Vey, You're Gay
programme.desc: C.C. (Lauren Lane) is annoyed when Maxwell (Charles Shaughnessy) hires a gorgeous publicist (Catherine Oxenberg) to help him with his image.

programme.title: The Nanny: Shopaholic
programme.desc: Fran's (Fran Drescher) reaction to the news that her ex is engaged lands her in Shoppers Anonymous. With Charles Shaughnessy, Daniel Davis.

programme.title: The Nanny: The Party's Over
programme.desc: Fran is arrested for owning an unlicensed singles party business and Uncle Manny comes to the rescue.

programme.title: The Nanny: The Two Mrs. Sheffields
programme.desc: Maxwell (Charles Shaughnessy) pops the big question to Fran (Fran Drescher) just to aggravate his mother (Dina Merrill). With Daniel Davis and Lauren Lane.

programme.title: The Nanny: Having His Baby
programme.desc: An actress (Donna Dixon) who is a single mother prompts Fran (Fran Drescher) to consider artificial insemination. With Charles Shaughnessy and Daniel Davis.

programme.title: The Nanny: The Unkindest Cut
programme.desc: Fran's (Fran Drescher) trip to Hollywood takes a twist when she lands on the set of "Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman." With Charles Shaughnessy, Jane Seymour and Joe Lando.

programme.title: Married With Children: High I.Q.
programme.desc: An invitation to join the high intelligence Alpha club, is issued to Kelly and not Bud. When they discover the real reason behind the gathering, Kelly and Bud decide to handle things with the usual Bundy charm (and violence).

programme.title: Married With Children: Teacher Pets
programme.desc: Bud's belief that his 40-year-old teacher is romantic interested in him is greeted by laughter from everyone. But another student smells the smoke and wants the fire for herself.

programme.title: Married With Children: The Goodbye Girl
programme.desc: When Kelly's modeling school closes down, she gets a new job as a greeter at the TV World theme park. When this is threatened by her low performance ratings, Kelly is moved into Commercial Land where she plays "the Verminator" who hunts down roaches.

programme.title: Married With Children: The Gas Station Show
programme.desc: When Al can't pay his bill at the gas station, he is forced to don a uniform and work at the station. He spends the day being hounded by motorists, as well as Peg and the kids.

programme.title: Married With Children: England Show - Pt 1
programme.desc: Lower Uncton, England 1653-- Seamus McBundy makes the mistake of insulting a witch who casts an evil spell upon the land, shading the town in darkness forever--as long as a male Bundy lives.

programme.title: Married With Children: England Show - Pt 2
programme.desc: The Bundys delight in their comped trip to England, spending here and there. All the while, the town of Upper Uncton conspires to kill the Bundys outside Lower Uncton, so the curse will remain and Upper Uncton can still rake in profits as a tourist town.

programme.title: Married With Children: England Show - Pt 3
programme.desc: The Bundys are cornered by both towns. Upper Uncton wants them dead so they can continue to profit as a tourist trap while Lower Uncton wants them dead so they can end the curse.

programme.title: Married With Children: Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: Al is shocked about having another kid when Peggy's relatives leave their five-year-old son Seven in the Bundy home.

programme.title: Married With Children: T-R-A-Something-Something Spells Tramp
programme.desc: Kelly has to walk through the wilderness after dumping her boyfriend in the forest. Al and Peg try to 'talk' their marriage alive, but without success. Bud dates a girl with the measles.

programme.title: Married With Children: Every Bundy Has a Birthday
programme.desc: Peggy discovers that Seven does not know when his birthday is, and the family decides to celebrate him... on Al's birthday.

programme.title: Married With Children: Al on the Rocks
programme.desc: Al has to take a job as a topless bartender to pay for Seven's doctor bill, but Peggy fears that Bud and Kelly might make Seven sick, and kicks them out of the house.

programme.title: Married With Children: What I Did for Love
programme.desc: Peggy tries to make Al more interested in having sex with her by purchasing new dresses, unsuccessfully.

programme.title: Married With Children: Frat Chance
programme.desc: Bud starts his own fraternity to get women.

programme.title: Married With Children: The Chicago Wine Party
programme.desc: The Bundys vote against a two cent beer tax.

programme.title: Married With Children: Kelly Doesn't Live Here Anymore
programme.desc: Al makes Kelly get a job, so she becomes a waitress.

programme.title: Married With Children: Rock of Ages
programme.desc: Al and the family try to sneak into the first-class lounge by dressing up like rock stars.

programme.title: Walking Britain's Lost Railways: Sheffield
programme.desc: Rob Bell follows the line over the bleak Pennines.

programme.title: Walking Britain's Lost Railways: Dartmoor
programme.desc: The Plymouth-Exeter line was built to transport rice pudding.

programme.title: Walking Britain's Lost Railways: North Wales

programme.title: Walking Britain's Lost Railways: Norfolk

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters: Father and Son
programme.desc: The one-hour special, BBQ PITMASTERS: FATHER VS. SON features the King of 'Cue as he hits the road with the crowned prince by his side.

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters: Revenge Ham
programme.desc: Three of the toughest Pitmasters from previous seasons are back and in this first round battle, fresh ham and cowboy steak are on the menu. Who will come out on top?

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters: Brisket Redemption'
programme.desc: Lee Ann Whippen is looking to avenge her loss in the Season Two finale to Shad Kirton. Meanwhile, the chicken king, Jamie Geer just might play spoiler. Is Shad on his way to another Grand Championship? Or will he have to cancel the victory parade?

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters: Smoker Envy
programme.desc: Three All-Stars are back and competing against each other for the first time. For this round Brisket and Venison tenderloin are for the cooking.

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters: Ribs Rematch
programme.desc: $50,000 and the coveted title of Kingsford BBQ Pitmasters All-Star Grand Champion are on the line. Reigning Grand Champion Robby Royal is looking for another victory over Junior Urias and John Coon.

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters: In Like A Brisket, Out Like A Lamb
programme.desc: $50,000 and the coveted title of Kingsford BBQ Pitmasters All-Star Grand Champion are on the line. This matchup features the hottest pitmaster on the competition circuit, Tim Grant, looking for his first win on BBQ Pitmasters.
programme.sub-title: In Like A Brisket, Out Like A Lamb

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters: The Trigg is Up
programme.desc: Pork belly and beef ribs are both on the menu, and Corey and Craig think Johnny just might have the advantage. Can the Grand Father of BBQ move one step closer to another Grand Championship?

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters: Duck, Duck... Pork!
programme.desc: $50,000 and the coveted title of Kingsford BBQ Pitmasters All-Star Grand Champion are on the line. The first round battles are over and six pitmasters are still in the running for BBQ's ultimate prize.

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters: Fowl Play
programme.desc: $50,000 and the coveted title of Kingsford BBQ Pitmasters All-Star Grand Champion are on the line. The last spot in the All-Star finale is up for grabs, and three of biggest names in the business are ready for battle.

programme.title: On the Case: Unmistakable Truth
programme.desc: A family of three is murdered and investigators must take on one of their own in order to find justice.

programme.title: On the Case: Trapped by Lies
programme.desc: Before police can catch a depraved killer of a 15 year old girl, they must first unravel a puzzling series of lies.

programme.title: On the Case: Profile of a Killer
programme.desc: When a beautiful young woman is found murdered in the basement of her brand new home, Police are forced to use cutting edge techniques to solve a terrifying mystery.

programme.title: On the Case: Final Words
programme.desc: A devoted mother returns home from work and finds her 17-year-old daughter has been murdered. Was her killer the mysterious boyfriend she had written about in her journal?

programme.title: On the Case: A Knock on the Door
programme.desc: A beautiful young mother is found murdered in the bedroom of her home. The only witness was her five year old son. Would he be able to help police solve the crime?

programme.title: On the Case: Painful Memories
programme.desc: A young marine comes home and finds his nine month pregnant wife savagely beaten in their bedroom. Was he an innocent victim or could he have been responsible for the terrible crime.

programme.title: On the Case: Snapshot to Murder
programme.desc: A high school student vanishes into thin air during a day studying in the park. Will a photograph from a nearby celebration help solve the case?

programme.title: On the Case: A Deadly Secret
programme.desc: A small town hair dresser is found beaten and strangled in her beauty salon. After the investigation goes cold, an act of conscience cracks the case.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Jeep Grand Wagoneer
programme.desc: X pimps a Jeep owned by a contractor who's always on the go. The guys at G.A.S. give it a 'lowrider' style paint job and airbags, and add the ultimate contractors tool box to the back!

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Pontiac
programme.desc: X and the guys take in a Pontiac Sunbird. This beat down convertible's getting a new lease on life as a 'Tiki-mobile', complete with Tiki graphics, binoculars and an Italian ice machine!

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Crown Victoria Station Wagon
programme.desc: X surprises an nurse by turning her 1984 Ford Crown Victoria station wagon into a hot-rod style ambulance, with a CATscan-style sound system and a video monitor shaped like a defibrillator!

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Chevy Cavalier
programme.desc: X and the guys turn a Chevy Cavalier into a one of a kind sparkly 'root-beer' painted creation - complete with a gumball machine, a scrapbooking station and virtual reality gaming seats!

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Subaru Impreza
programme.desc: Xzibit and the crew take aim at a 1996 Subaru Impreza. They turn the owner's ride into a 'rally car' with off-road tires, authentic rally graphics and a big load of paintball gear!

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Cadillac Hearse
programme.desc: X surprises the owner of a Cadillac hearse with a 'macabre mobile' complete with a velvet interior, a 42 inch monitor, and a motorized coffin that contains a barbeque grill and refrigerator!

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Daihatsu HiJet
programme.desc: Xzibit shows you how to transform your tired old car into a fully loaded cruisin' machine. Today, Wyatt gets his 1988 Daihatsu Hi-Jet pimped with a mini-fridge, guitar amp and DVD player.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme 1986
programme.desc: Xzibit shows you how to transform your tired old hatchback into a fully loaded cruisin' machine. Today, Logan gets his Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme pimped with a karaoke machine in the trunk.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Honda Civic 1992
programme.desc: Xzibit shows you how to transform your tired old hatchback into a fully loaded cruisin' machine. Christine gets her 1992 Honda Civic pimped with leather massage seats and a PlayStation 2.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Mitsubishi Mirage
programme.desc: Xzibit shows you how to transform your tired old hatchback into a fully loaded cruisin' machine. Today, Antwon gets his Mitsubishi Mirage pimped with a goldfish tank in the backseat.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1967 Ford Mustang
programme.desc: Xzibit shows you how to transform your tired old hatchback into a fully loaded cruisin' machine. Today, Mary gets her 1967 Ford Mustang pimped with a DVD player and ceiling monitor.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1985 Ford Ranger
programme.desc: Xzibit shows you how to transform your tired old car into a fully loaded cruisin' machine. Today, Jared gets his 1985 Ford Ranger pimped with a ping-pong table and personal video arcade.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Pontiac Trans Am
programme.desc: Xzibit shows you how to transform your tired old car into a fully loaded cruisin' machine. Today, Danelle gets her 1981 Pontiac Trans Am pimped with an espresso machine and a chandelier.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1974 Chevy Luv
programme.desc: Xzibit shows you how to transform your tired old hatchback into a fully loaded cruisin' machine. Today, Neil gets his 1974 Chevy 'Luv' Truck pimped with a 7,000 watt sound system.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1989 Ford Mustang
programme.desc: Xzibit shows you how to transform your tired old car into a fully loaded cruisin' machine. Today, Shonda gets her 1989 Ford Mustang convertible pimped with a photo-booth and DVD player.

programme.title: Pacific Blue: Heatwave
programme.desc: A scorching heatwave has descended on the beach and is making everyone crazy. T.C. and Chris are called in when a stalker begins killing to attract a radio sex therapist's attention.

programme.title: Pacific Blue: Burnout
programme.desc: A body builder working at Sheila's restaurant is hooked on steroids and in debt to her dealer, another body builder who is out of control due to frequent use of his own product.

programme.title: Pacific Blue: Moving Target
programme.desc: Things heat up for T.C. when a woman from his past witnesses a crime and he's assigned to be her bodyguard. Meanwhile, Victor faces down his demons in the boxing ring.

programme.title: Pacific Blue: Captive Audience
programme.desc: When T.C., Cory and a pregnant woman are held hostage by a team of violent thieves, Palermo tries to negotiate their release.

programme.title: Pacific Blue: The Phoenix
programme.desc: A series of fires has T.C., Chris and Palermo hunting down an arsonist long thought to be dead. Meanwhile, Cory calls in the experts to catch a mouse running loose in the station.

programme.title: Pacific Blue: The Big Spin
programme.desc: T.C. and Palermo fear for Chris when she falls for an edgy recruit with a death wish. Meanwhile, the squad wants in on Elvis's lotto-winning scheme.

programme.title: Pacific Blue: All Jammed Up
programme.desc: T.C. and Palermo track down a cyclist preying on commuters stuck in traffic. Cory and Chris get "hooked" into a vice assignment to snag an arms dealer.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Love Letter
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel go to France to look for the lost wedding vows of Josephine Pontoise and Guy de Bourdin, which would prove their heir is the rightful owner of St. Agnes Sur-Loire.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: A Good Year
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel travel to France to find the lost stones from Marie Antoinette's Crown.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Nothing But the Truth
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are reunited with Stewie Harper in the search for the Chalice of Truth in France.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Last Knight
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel go to Paris, France after the Sword of Jacques de Molay, Grand Master of the Knights Templar. Rival relic hunter Rita Rosellini is also after the sword.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Possessed
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are in Brussels, Belgium in search of the sacred sundial of Zeus in order to stop the Vampires.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Memories of Montmartre
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel head to Paris, France to find a stolen locket, so they can clear Sydney's dead grandmother of the charges.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Put Back
programme.desc: Kuba, Africa 100 AD: Worshippers of Woote curse his idol to protect it. 2000: Ross Crawford comes to Sydney, because he took the idol and the curse has accelerated his aging.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Legend of the Lost
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel set out to find if the legend of the lost civilization in New Guinea is actually true. Unfortunately, they have to team up with Derek Lloyd.

programme.title: Iron Chef: Battle Saury (Fish)
programme.desc: Nouvelle French chef Tsutomu Hiroi battles against new wave Japanese Iron Chef Michiba.

programme.title: Iron Chef: Battle Yam
programme.desc: Soutetsu Fujii, the first Buddhist priest to appear at Kitchen Stadium, takes on Iron Chef Sakai in the battle of yam.

programme.title: Iron Chef: France Special: Part 1
programme.desc: Chairman Takeshi Kaga travels to battle the great French chefs. Witness as Iron Chef Sakai and Iron Chef Nakamura battle to defend the honor of Iron Chefs and the Gourmet Academy.

programme.title: Iron Chef: France Special: Part 2
programme.desc: Chairman Takeshi Kaga travels to battle the great French chefs. Witness as Iron Chef Sakai and Iron Chef Nakamura battle to defend the honor of Iron Chefs and the Gourmet Academy.

programme.title: Iron Chef: Prawn
programme.desc: Chen must face a man who was his father's trusted apprentice. When they both prepare his father's signature dish, who will win?

programme.title: Iron Chef: Battle Matsutake Mushroom
programme.desc: Iron Chef Sakai meets the challenge from Masamitsu Takahashi on the Japanese theme ingredient matsutake mushroom. Who will reign supreme?

programme.title: Iron Chef: Battle Shark's Fin
programme.desc: Iron Chef Michiba is put to the test by Challenger Hoi Roi Wing. Will he be able to overcome an unexpected obstacle?

programme.title: Iron Chef: Battle Pumpkin
programme.desc: Kouji Kobayashi, a chef of Italian cuisine who was thought to be disappeared, makes a surprise appearance to challenge Iron Chef Chen in the battle of pumpkin.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog: Dulcy
programme.desc: After Dulcy exhibits strange behavior, Sally discovers she's going through a rites of passage stage of her adolescence. In Dragon tradition, she is drawn to Dragon Lair, a migratory nesting ground, through trancelike visits from her mother.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog: The Void
programme.desc: After Sonic is almost sucked inside the Void, he finds a huge Ring which Sally believes is an ancient relic but it turns out to be trick of the Sorcerer, Nagus.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog: The Odd Couple//Ro-Becca
programme.desc: When a blizzard hits Knothole causing Dulcy to demolish a few huts during a landing, Sonic is forced to bunk with Antoine. It is truly a marriage of opposites, with Antoine constantly picking up after Sonic.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog: Cry of the Wolf
programme.desc: On a mission to contact the first Freedom Fighters on the King's List, Sonic and the others are forced to travel through a tunnel which carries a curse against all intruders.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog: Drood Henge
programme.desc: When Uncle Chuck's bug reveals Robotnik's search for the legendary Deep Power Stones, he informs Sally, who tries to retrieve data regarding the Royal Family Secret.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog: Spyhog
programme.desc: After Antoine saves Sally's life during a raid, Sonic can't stand his bragging and zips in to see Uncle Chuck, who finds out his bug in Robotnik's HQ is malfunctioning.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog: The Doomsday Project
programme.desc: When a Pod lands in Knothole, Sonic and Sally realize the Doomsday Machine is already in operation. The Freedom Fighter groups break into the Doomsday Machine, only to find Robotnik let them in.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: The Bird! The Bird!
programme.desc: While venturing in a snowy world, Toad is kidnapped by a nearsighted Birdo who is convinced that he is her missing baby.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Butch Mario & The Luigi Kid
programme.desc: While trying to rescue the Princess from an abandoned mine, the Mario brothers find themselves running from Sheriff Mouser and his minions who are after the large reward Koopa has promised for their capture.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: King Mario of Cramalot
programme.desc: Mario and Co arrive in Cramalot, only to be assualted by Beezos. They are saved by Mervin the magician, who tells them about how Koopa took over Cramalot.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario's Magic Carpet
programme.desc: Mario and Co are traveling through a desert, dying of thirst. Thanks to a boobytrap, they wind up in the palace of Sultan Pasbah, who tries to force Princess into his harem, while the guys are sent to the dungeon.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Rolling Down The River
programme.desc: The Marios and Toad are trying to save Princess from Koopa's riverboat. When their plan goes horribly wrong, Toad gets caught and the Marios barely escape with their lives.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Bonkers from Yonkers
programme.desc: Mario and Co head to the Linguini Empire to attend a benefit spaghetti dinner. When they arrive, Princess and Toad are separated from the Marios and meet Koopa, who's taken over.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario and the Beanstalk
programme.desc: Desperate for cash, the Marios trade the royal cow for bean seeds. Princess scolds them, and accidentally sneezes, blowing the beans into the yard.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Love 'em and Leave 'em
programme.desc: Mario and Co arrive in Rotunda Land, which is ruled by the uptight Queen Rotunda. After being caught, Mario unintentionally gets Rotunda to drink a love potion, causing her to fall in love with him, much to his dismay.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Jeremy Bamber
programme.desc: An investigation into Jeremy Bamber's brutal murder of his family in Essex, which occurred in 1985. Sentenced for life, he still maintains he is innocent. Is the right person behind bars?

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Murder Of Rhys Jones
programme.desc: The parents of innocent 11-year-old Rhys Jones, shot on his way home from a football club in Liverpool 2007, speak about the harrowing day when they lost their son.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Murder Of Stephen Cameron
programme.desc: Gripping documentary examining the fatal stabbing of 21-year-old motorist Stephen Cameron during a motorway altercation in 1996.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Rose West
programme.desc: With her husband Fred, Rose West brutally murdered ten girls between 1973 and 1979, making her one of the most high profile serial killers in the UK.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Keith Blakelock
programme.desc: In 1985, PC Keith Blakelock was murdered during a riot on a housing estate in London, triggered after a black woman died of heart failure during a house search. Nobody has been brought to justice for his murder, despite three investigations.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Omagh Bombing
programme.desc: Survivors, victims' relatives and former detectives reflect on the Real IRA car bomb that killed 29 people in Omagh, Northern Ireland in 1998.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Crossbow Cannibal
programme.desc: Former friends of Stephen Griffiths open up about the Bradford serial killer, who was caught firing a crossbow through Suzanne Blamires' head in 2010.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Jimmy Savile
programme.desc: Jimmy Savile: From national treasure to one of the UK's most notorious sex offenders: this is the story of how the revelation of Jimmy Savile's crimes left the UK reeling.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Freaks Of Nature
programme.desc: Freaks Of Nature: A small community is devastated by an earth-shattering 'boom,' while an paranormal fog seems to alter the very fabric of time.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Ancient Mysteries
programme.desc: Ancient Mysteries: A girl finds a 1000-year-old skull that may prove aliens once walked the planet, and ancient stone carvings could rewrite the story of evolution.

programme.title: UFOs Declassified: Ufo's Over LA
programme.desc: UFOs over LA: February 1942, and the sky over Los Angeles erupts as anti-aircraft guns begin firing on strange targets. Could this have been an extraterrestrial raid?

programme.title: UFOs Declassified: Red Alert
programme.desc: Red Alert: During the Cold War, strange lights and unidentified objects put governments around the world on red alert. Could extra-terrestrials have been responsible?

programme.title: UFOs Declassified: Black Triangle
programme.desc: Black Triangle: A look at some of the most widely witnessed UFO events ever, including large black triangular objects in the night sky regularly spotted in the 80s and 90s.

programme.title: UFOs Declassified: UFO Crash Sites
programme.desc: Alien autopsies, secret military files, and recovered pieces of an extra-terrestrial spacecraft: this is the story of the Roswell incident and the truth behind the UFO.

programme.title: UFOs Declassified: UFOs vs Airlines
programme.desc: UFO's vs Airlines: Are UFOs a threat to civil aviation? The culture of silence within the aviation industry could speak volumes.

programme.title: UFOs Declassified: Shoot 'Em Down
programme.desc: Shoot 'Em Down: Fighter pilots from the UK to Peru have encountered UFOs. What happens when a UFO gets too close for comfort?

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Falling Man, Space Rocks, Missing Feet
programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. Falling Man, Space Rocks, Missing Feet: A high-rise window washer somehow survives a 50-storey fall and ball-sized ice chunks fall from the sky.
programme.sub-title: Falling Man, Space Rocks, Missing Feet

programme.title: America's Cutest Puppies: New York, NY
programme.desc: If these puppies can make it here, they can make it anywhere! Here in the Big Apple the pooches are dogged, audacious and will steal your heart in a New York minute!

programme.title: America's Cutest Puppies: Chicago, IL
programme.desc: Chicago may be the known as the “Windy City” and true to style, these dogs will blow you away! Puggles and poodles and “All that Jazz” make up this pool of playful pooches.

programme.title: America's Cutest Puppies: Miami, FL
programme.desc: Miami may be known as the land of beautiful people, but it’s also the land of beautiful puppies! Look out South Beach – Hurricane CutePuppy is coming at full force and about to knock the flip-flops off these judges!

programme.title: America's Cutest Puppies: Grand Finale
programme.desc: After searching the country and sniffing out hundreds of dogs, the ultimate competition has arrived. The ten regional winners from each city have made it out to L.A. to compete for the first-ever title of “America’s Cutest Puppy” and grand prize.

programme.title: Pick A Puppy: S02 Episode 07: Bundle Of Joy
programme.desc: The Johnstone family meets a three different rescue dogs, but can only pick one to give all of their love. Will it be JJ- a Maltese mix, Marley- a Labrador Retriever, or Ruby- a German Shepherd mix?

programme.title: Pick A Puppy: S02 Episode 08: Puppy Day Afternoon
programme.desc: The Nethery family is searching for a new dog to join their active and fun family. They meet West Highland Terriers, the Coton De Tulear, and also the Wheaton Terrier- but they all have to be mindful of Dad's allergies.

programme.title: Pick A Puppy: S02 Episode 09: Puffballs
programme.desc: The Atkinson family visits the Brussels Griffon, Sheltie and Toy Manchester Terrier in hopes of finding a brand new puppy to grow up with their three young children and help teach them responsibility.

programme.title: Pick A Puppy: S02 Episode 10: New Companion
programme.desc: The Bhatti family is ready for their first puppy. While they visit the Cairn Terrier, the Dutch Sheep Dog and also the Yorkie Poo their young son hoping that one of these breeds will be a buddy he can call his own.

programme.title: Pick A Puppy: S02 Episode 11: Marco Polo
programme.desc: The Pascoe family is ready to love again after the recent passing of their first family dog. They visit three different breeds - but have a hard time deciding. Will it be the Australian Shepherd, the Golden Retriever or the Viszula?

programme.title: Pick A Puppy: S02 Episode 12: Love Times Two
programme.desc: The Haggith family is visited by three rescue dogs that all deserve a loving home: Benny- a Lhasa Apso mix, Gibson- a Maltese mix and finally Baron- a Dashcund/Poodle mix. But only one rescue can be a match for them, and their current family dog.

programme.title: My Pet's Gone Viral: Episode 8
programme.desc: Dog cleans house, UK / Sponge: 53 Cat slaps Dog / Baby and Puppy Meet for first time, 9.5 million (UK)

programme.title: My Pet's Gone Viral: Episode 1
programme.desc: Jecht: Canada Dog / Alarm Clock Kitty 4.5 million views / Linus – Bulldog & baby 24,500,000 hits.

programme.title: My Pet's Gone Viral: Episode 2
programme.desc: Cat Cries Like A Baby, 2.6 million / Dexter & Peppermint / Denver Guilty Dog – 24 million views.

programme.title: Superstar Dogs: Episode 3
programme.desc: This episode's three competitors are Kathryn and Labradoodle Fergus, John and Staffordshire Bull Terrier Coco, and Jenny and Papillion Cross Lily-Rose. Who will make it through to the semi-finals?

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: In this episode of Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown, Tony travels to Madagascar, a place that outsiders understand surprisingly little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: After eight years, Tony returns to South Korea. And this time, he’s no stranger to kimchi. But just as Tony has changed, so has Korea.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Bourdain looks at the Congo as one of the more industrialized powers in Africa now largely crumbled to nothingness and chaos with Tim Butcher author of Blood River.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown: Mississippi Delta
programme.desc: Tony seeks to challenge his notions of Mississippi by taking a road trip to meet a cast of Mississippians enjoying the diverse foodways and embracing the traditional and contemporary music worlds.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: With the slight relaxation of control by the government of Myanmar, Tony is finally able to explore one of the most fabled and beautiful areas of Asia.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown, Tony returns to one of his favourite places on Earth, Vietnam.He journeys to a city he has never been to, Hu?, The City of Ghosts.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony travels to Shanghai. Forget the antiquated views you might hold about a communist-run, creativity-devoid State of androids. The modern China is a vibrant, dynamic monument to capitalism.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Few countries have a more contentious relationship with the United States than Iran. In this episode we heads to this Shia Muslim nation to explore a country few Americans have visited since the 80s.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: The first time Tony visited Beirut, it didn't end well. Now Tony is back in Beirut, where all the world’s troubles and all the world's good comes together to form a city like no other.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: New England
programme.desc: This week we are with one couple who have babies on the brain and another who are only 3 months from having one.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Windsor Revisit
programme.desc: About two years ago, first time buyers asked us to guide them. I've come back to see whether or not they lived happily.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Edinburgh Revisit
programme.desc: A year ago, Kirstie and I were pounding the streets of Edinburgh. I've come back to see if all the hard work was worth it.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: The contestants must each serve one dish of their own creation, that features a spice, on the specially designed menu. Under the watchful eye of John, the amateurs will be challenged like never before to deliver dishes of an exceptional standard.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Kent
programme.desc: 20-somethings Sophie and Niall are ready to buy their first place. They say they want something practical-but it soon becomes clear that for super-fussy Sophie- practical is no match for party pad.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Wiltshire
programme.desc: One couple want room for 4 children and a 4x4 business -whilst the other want a place that will 'give them a big hug' whenever they walk through the door!

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: South East England
programme.desc: One family is stuck in a house bursting at the seams and the other is stuck in one room at mum and dads. It's a quest for space-and it's up to Kirstie and Phil to make these searches blast off.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: Happy Birthday and Too Many More
programme.desc: When Laura and Rob give Ritchie a birthday party, 63 screaming kids cause a ruckus at the Petrie house.
programme.sub-title: Happy Birthday and Too Many More

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: The Brave and the Backache
programme.desc: Rob consults a psychiatrist to determine whether a series of mysterious ailments are psychosomatic.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: The Pen Is Mightier Than the Mouth
programme.desc: Rob and Buddy find themselves overworked when Sally becomes a television personality overnight.
programme.sub-title: The Pen Is Mightier Than the Mouth

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: My Part-Time Wife
programme.desc: When Laura fills in for Sally at the office, her performance exceeds everyone's expectations.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: Honeymoons Are for the Lucky
programme.desc: Rob recalls the hectic time of his Army marriage to Laura and the difficulty in obtaining a three-day pass for their honeymoon.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: How to Spank a Star
programme.desc: At the insistence of an overbearing guest star, Rob takes over as producer of 'The Alan Brady Show.'

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: The Plots Thicken
programme.desc: A family crisis develops when both Rob and Laura's parents compete to get the couple committed to their respective cemetery plots.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: Scratch My Car and Die
programme.desc: A scratch on Rob's new car causes a domestic crisis at the Petrie house.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: The Return of Edwin Carp
programme.desc: Rob attempts to coax a legendary radio star out of retirement for a TV special.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: October Eve
programme.desc: An oil painting of Laura is being shown at an art gallery and although she posed fully clothed, the artist took the liberty of 'undraping' her.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: Dear Mrs. Petrie, Your Husband Is In Jail
programme.desc: Rob goes to see an old Army buddy's nightclub act and winds up spending the night in jail.
programme.sub-title: Dear Mrs. Petrie, Your Husband Is In Jail

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: My Neighbor's Husband's Other Life
programme.desc: Rob and Laura suspect their neighbor Jerry is having an affair after spotting him at a fancy restaurant with a pretty blonde.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: I'd Rather Be Bald Than Have No Head at All
programme.desc: Fearing he may be going bald, Rob tries a barber's secret recipe which consists of ingredients usually reserved for a salad.
programme.sub-title: I'd Rather Be Bald Than Have No Head at All

programme.title: Great British Menu: Finals Dessert
programme.desc: It's judgement day as the chefs not only learn the top three desserts but the judges announce the winning menu. Fast show writer and performer Charlie Higson helps judge the puddings.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Banquet
programme.desc: It's the climax of the competition as the winning chefs cook at the Comic Relief Banquet at the Royal Albert Hall. But it's not plain sailing - the chefs have to contend with getting into the kitchen late.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Scotland Starter
programme.desc: This week it's the turn of the Scottish chefs; Michael Smith, Tony Singh, and Alan Murchison. Today it's the battle of the starters. So which dish is going to fly the flag for Scotland? Will it be cock-a-leekie terrine, pigeon salad, or Scotch pie?

programme.title: Great British Menu: Scotland Fish
programme.desc: Today the Scottish chefs are all fighting for supremacy in the fish course. So who's going to come out on top? Will it be the lobster cocktail cooked four ways, lobster with vegetables, or mussels and langoustine with sorrel soup and tattie scones?

programme.title: Great British Menu: Scotland Main
programme.desc: Today it's the battle of the main courses, as the Scottish chefs go all out to win, with their takes on hogget Scotch pie with peas and carrots, steak and chips with tomato relish and lamb with haggis, pearl barley, and turnip puree.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Scotland Dessert
programme.desc: Today it's the last chance for the Scottish chefs; Michael Smith, Tony Singh and Alan Murchison to show they've got what it takes to win. So which dessert will deliver the sweet smell of success?

programme.title: Great British Menu: Scotland Judging
programme.desc: It's judgment day on Great British Menu and the two chefs who battled their way through yesterday, cook their entire menus for the Great British Menu judges, Prue Leith, Matthew Fort and Oliver Peyton.

programme.title: Great British Menu: North West Fish
programme.desc: Today sparks fly as the chefs from the North West – Johnnie Mountain, Lisa Allen and Aiden Byrne are fighting to win the fish course. So which dish is going to be king?

programme.title: Great British Menu: North West Main
programme.desc: Today it's the battle of the main courses, as the chefs from the North West – Aiden Byrne, Lisa Allen and Johnnie Mountain – square off. The main course is a pivotal point of the judging, so which dish will get top marks?

programme.title: Great British Menu: North West Dessert
programme.desc: Today it's the last chance for the chefs – Lisa Allen, Johnnie Mountain and Aiden Byrne to prove they are fit to cook at this year's prestigious banquet. So which dessert will former champion Marcus Wareing award top marks?

programme.title: Great British Menu: Central Starter
programme.desc: This week it's the turn of the chefs from the Central region – Daniel Clifford, Richard Bainbridge and Will Holland. Today they're launching their culinary assault with the starters.

programme.desc: From abseiling down the peak of Cape Town’s iconic Table Mountain to Learning how to do Rodeo the hard way in Maple Creek Saskatchewan Canada, prepare for a non-stop Roller coaster ride.

programme.title: Extreme Frontiers: Episode 1
programme.desc: From abseiling down the peak of Cape Town’s iconic Table Mountain to Learning how to do Rodeo the hard way in Maple Creek Saskatchewan Canada, prepare for a non-stop Roller coaster ride.

programme.title: Extreme Frontiers: Episode 2
programme.desc: From abseiling down the peak of Cape Town’s iconic Table Mountain to Learning how to do Rodeo the hard way in Maple Creek Saskatchewan Canada, prepare for a non-stop Roller coaster ride.

programme.title: Off Limits: Lyle Lovett And His Large Band
programme.desc: It’s 7:00 p.m. in Fort Worth, Texas. There is a buzz in the Bass Performance Hall as 2,000 people sit underneath the golden dome waiting to be more than entertained. They are anticipating a full-out frontal assault of charm and wit.
programme.sub-title: Lyle Lovett And His Large Band

programme.title: Off Limits: 8 Wing Pilot Training
programme.desc: This may be the most appropriately named vehicle in the world. It is an absolute brute. The Hercules CC-130 can haul 90 soldiers more than 6,000 miles and set down on short, ragged runways where other planes wouldn’t dream of landing.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Tennis Anyone?
programme.desc: Appa and Umma sneak into a fancy neighborhood to play tennis. Shannon gives Omar some dubious advice. Janet befriends a coworker.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: A Tangled Web
programme.desc: Cousin Nayoung arrives with an unconventional pet. Jung and Shannon have a stressful lunch with Umma. Kimchee ignores a coworker's feelings.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Cookie Monster
programme.desc: Appa finds marijuana in the house. Shannon throws a staff party that doesn't go as planned.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Chance Encounter
programme.desc: Appa and Kimchee enjoy an impromptu hangout together. Janet and Umma find an envelope of money in the store. Jung and Shannon struggle to watch TV together.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Slippery Slope
programme.desc: Appa worries about Umma after a minor household accident. Janet uses Jung's past to boost her reputation with students. A high school reunion has Kimchee thinking about an old flame.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Field of Schemes
programme.desc: Appa's reputation as an impartial umpire faces a stiff test. Jung and Kimchee disagree about discipline. Janet worries a sweater may be haunted.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Who's Pranking Who?
programme.desc: Kimchee's plan to impress the higher-ups backfires. Shannon inadvertently insults Umma's cooking. Appa and Janet enter a prank war.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Matchy Matchy
programme.desc: Umma tries to set up Janet with their new mason. Shannon encourages Jung to give Appa a gift. Kimchee and Shannon work on employee evaluations.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Hugs & Prayers
programme.desc: Janet and Appa take a first aid course. Umma worries her prayers cause more harm than good. Shannon and Jung discuss their relationship.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Friends and Family
programme.desc: Jung gives Appa and Umma a business presentation for the store. Shannon and Kimchee's office teasing leads to a meaningful discovery for Kimchee.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Gay Discount
programme.desc: Mr. Kim offers a gay discount at the store, while Mrs. Kim tries to find Janet a cool, Christian, Korean boyfriend.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Janet's Photos
programme.desc: Mr. Kim gets competitive with Janet over who is the better photographer. When Jung applies for a promotion, it has a surprising effect on Mrs. Kim and Kimchee.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Ddong Chim
programme.desc: Jung draws the wrong kind of attention from his boss when he gives Kimchee a Korean wedgie at work. Mr. Kim commissions Janet's friend Gerald to take his photo instead of asking Janet.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Frank and Nayoung
programme.desc: Mr. Kim is frustrated with Frank, a repairman who talks too much, while Janet's cousin Nayoung visits from Korea, challenging Janet's sense of what it means to "be Korean."

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Wingman
programme.desc: Mr. Chin asks Mr. Kim to be his wingman on a date, which is fine until Mrs. Kim tags along. Janet asks Jung to help her fix a dripping pipe at the store, but the repair is interrupted by an intruder.

programme.title: Cocomelon: Favourite Food!
programme.desc: In Cocomelon, baby JJ and his siblings go on fun every-day adventures with nursery, play, exploration and learning - situations which any pre-schooler could relate to. Fun, relatable stories set to catchy songs.
