programme.desc: In Cocomelon, baby JJ and his siblings go on fun every-day adventures with nursery, play, exploration and learning - situations which any pre-schooler could relate to. Fun, relatable stories set to catchy songs.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Treks
programme.desc: Every journey made by foot promises a grand adventure. From the highest mountains to the wildest jungle realms, treks venture down the road less travelled, allowing us to connect to nature, history, and culture, one step at a time.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Drives
programme.desc: A journey by road expands our horizons, allowing us to explore the depth and breadth of whole countries and continents, stopping whenever and wherever we chose.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Cruises
programme.desc: There is something seductive about setting sail. Cruises offer us a chance to dip our toes into the 70% of our planet awash with oceans, rivers, and lakes, exploring places that can only be reached by daring to leave the shore.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Flights
programme.desc: Our experience of the world’s greatest marvels is literally and figuratively elevated when we explore them from the air. Whether you travel by air balloon, helicopter, light aircraft, a grand perspective is always guaranteed.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Land Adventures
programme.desc: Most land adventures come with some risk - a chance to confront our deepest fears, resist the pull of the ordinary, and soar into the wild unknown.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Water Adventures
programme.desc: We are captivated by oceans, rivers, and lakes - the power, the flow, the reflective stillness. And as we seek to get closer, we immerse ourselves in an expanding range of aquatic experiences.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Archipelagos
programme.desc: The romantic notion of island life has always attracted us. Explore the histories, cultures, and unique ways of life on the World’s Greatest Archipelagos - clusters of islands that share common bonds of geography, geology, and genealogy.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Makes Waves/It Came From Beyond
programme.desc: With the community pool closed for repairs and the temperature on the rise, Arthur and D.W. need a place to keep cool. Then, Grandma Thora takes in a stray: an adorable little dog named...Killer?
programme.sub-title: Arthur Makes Waves/It Came From Beyond

programme.title: Arthur: Three's a Crowd/A is for Angry
programme.desc: Prunella's loves doing yoga with her mom, but when her best friend joins them, will she be able to share her time? When Arthur decides to take on The Brain at a checkers competition, everyone rallies behind the underdog.
programme.sub-title: Three's a Crowd/A is for Angry

programme.title: Arthur: The "A" Team/Emily Swallows a Horse
programme.desc: Francine and Brain are the best players on the soccer team, and they wish their teammates could take the game a bit more seriously. And then Emily really wants the sparkly ball D.W. just found, so she tells a little white lie about it.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. Beats All/Buster the Myth Maker
programme.desc: After the Tibbles get a set of drums to play at the music festival, D.W. is determined to get an even bigger and louder one. Then, Buster is always telling the most incredible stories, but now he claims there is a tiger in the state forest.
programme.sub-title: D.W. Beats All/Buster the Myth Maker

programme.title: Arthur: Binky Goes Nuts/Breezy Listening Blues
programme.desc: When Binky discovers that he's allergic to peanuts, he has so many questions, but learns that the best way not to go nuts is to be well informed and to understand his allergy. Much to his horror, Brain gets a "B-" on a test.

programme.title: Arthur: Happy Anniversary
programme.desc: Arthur's parents have been married for 10 years and it's time to celebrate! But the festivities are cut short when the van breaks down, stranding the whole family. Will the Reads miss their fancy dinner reservation?

programme.title: Arthur: The Squirrels/Fern and Persimmony Glitchet
programme.desc: After watching the classic horror movie, "The Squirrels," Arthur and his friends are scared to step out into the playground, and everywhere else! Fern's story about perfect Felicity Bonchance is thought perfectly boring by her friends.

programme.title: Arthur: Desert Island Dish/The Secret About Secrets
programme.desc: When Mr. Ratburn challenges the class to find the perfect food for surviving on a desert island, everyone picks potato chips or ice cream! D.W. is told a secret and quickly learns that keeping one is a lot harder than she thought.
programme.sub-title: Desert Island Dish/The Secret About Secrets

programme.title: Arthur: Feeling Flush/Family Fortune
programme.desc: During a drought, Francine bets Arthur that her family can use less water than his. The TV show, Treasure Caravan, is coming to Elwood City! Arthur and D.W. are convinced they'll find treasures that will make them rich and famous.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. Aims High/Flaw and Order
programme.desc: D.W. wants to be the first person to set foot on Mars! But what if scary purple aliens eat her? Who's responsible for cracking Dad's cake platter? DUN-DUN! All the evidence points to Arthur!

programme.title: Arthur: The Curse of the Grebes/Arthur Changes Gears
programme.desc: The Elwood City Grebes haven't won the Baseball Championship since 1918. But with the addition of three players, the title is finally within reach. Arthur finally saves enough money to buy the bike of his dreams!
programme.sub-title: The Curse of the Grebes/Arthur Changes Gears

programme.title: Arthur: Unfinished/D.W., Bossy Boots
programme.desc: Arthur is completely riveted by a book and can't wait to see how it ends. But the last few pages are missing! Now what? For D.W., there's nothing better than getting her own way--that is, until all her friends stop playing with her.

programme.title: Arthur: Binky Vs. Binky/Operation: DW!
programme.desc: Binky may be tough and strong, but when it comes to sports, he always seems to choke. D.W. is having trouble hearing and needs an ear operation. Is it okay to be just a little bit scared?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Aaliyah & Alicia
programme.desc: Aaliyah has been able to share her life struggles with Alicia. However, despite living only 70 blocks away, Alicia refuses to meet her as she hasn't come out to her friends and family yet.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Nick & Melissa
programme.desc: Nick and Melissa fell in love at age 12 when they met on an online chat room. Now 18, Nick is ready to meet Melissa. But is Melissa the real deal or has Nick been entangled in lies?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Keyonnah & Bow Wow
programme.desc: Superfan Keyonnah can hardly believe her luck, she's almost certain that she's been having an online relationship with her childhood crush, the rapper Bow Wow. Is this too good to be true?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Mike & Caroline
programme.desc: Mike fell in love with Caroline online. He grew suspicious when she continually evaded meeting him, yet left notes at his car. Is Caroline an imposter or is she just afraid?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Craig & Zoe
programme.desc: Craig's sister introduced him to a beautiful girl named Zoe on Facebook. After talks online of a future life together, things turn sour. Now he wants to know who he gave his heart to.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Antwane & Tony
programme.desc: Nev and Max are contacted by Carmen who is sounding the alarm on behalf of her cousin, Antwane. He's been in a three-year romance with a man named Tony that he met on a telephone chat line.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Antoinette & Albert
programme.desc: A year after meeting 'T-lights' on Instagram, 'instaceleb' Antoinette is ready to meet him, but he always brushes off the idea. Is he really the online celebrity he claims to be?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Lucille & Kidd Cole
programme.desc: Lucille led a simple life until she was asked to work for music producer Kidd Cole. Companies were never paid and one day Kidd couldn't be found. Will she get the answers she needs?

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Killing Fields
programme.desc: A report about a desolate strip of land between Houston and Galveston where over 30 young women and girls have disappeared or have been murdered.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Boy Next Door
programme.desc: A report on the hunt for a serial killer suspected of murdering three young women from Los Angeles, California to Chicago, Illinois.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Playing With Fire
programme.desc: In September 2002, two men were found executed in a burning Mercedes in an upscale Hollywood neighborhood. What initially looked like a drug-related murder, turned out to be something entirely different, but the crime scene left little evidence to go on.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Dirty Little Secrets
programme.desc: In April 2006, Matt Baker, a pastor from Waco, Texas, returned home to find his wife Kari unconscious, with an empty bottle of Unisom and a suicide note beside her. Police ruled it a suicide. However, her family believed otherwise.

programme.title: 48 Hours: fugitive@hotmail.com
programme.desc: A report on the three-year manhunt and eventual capture of Dr. Yazeed “Yaz” Essa, a Cleveland doctor accused of murdering his wife, Rosemarie. In February 2005, weeks after Rosemarie’s death, tests proved that she had died of cyanide poisoning.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Hunt for Mr. Wright
programme.desc: A report on George Wright, who was sentenced to prison for the 1962 murder of New Jersey service station owner Walter Patterson, and who after spending 8 years in prison, escaped, and spent 40 years on the run from the authorities.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Chasing the Barefoot Bandit
programme.desc: A report on Colton Harris-Moore, also known as the “Barefoot Bandit,” because of his habit of committing crimes barefoot and leaving chalk outlines of his feet; and whose exploits included stealing planes, guns, yachts, and escaping to foreign countries.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Secrets, Lies and Alibis
programme.desc: John and Susan Sutton were sleeping in separate rooms in their Florida home, when a gunman entered their house and shot both of them several times. Susan was killed, but John survived. Nothing was taken from the house, proving the murder premeditated.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Long Island Serial Killer
programme.desc: A report on the disappearance of Shannan Gilbert, near Gilgo Beach, New York. The search for Shannan led to the discovery of a total of ten bodies in the scrub brush of Gilgo Beach, leading police to suspect the work of a serial killer.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sidecar Surprise
programme.desc: An unassuming mom in an oversized sweater tries to pull the wool over Ton & Allen's eyes at a storage auction in Arlington, VA. The guys uncover a black powder cannon designed in the 15th century & a Russian military motorcycle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chicago Grand Slam
programme.desc: 1984 Yamaha SS440 Snowmobile that introduced the revolutionary shock absorber suspension; rare autographed 1920s baseball glove; mint Hank Aaron signed baseball; authentic 1950s Robby the Robot collector toy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Battle Bought
programme.desc: Mint 1800s French "Harmonica Pistol" and a collection of '90s remote controlled combat robots.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Smoking Ton
programme.desc: WW2 Stuart M3 tank barrel and heavy duty tank treads; rare, collectors' 1890 silver inlayed humidor; high-end industrial meat slicer in the ultimate restaurant unit.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Animal Instincts
programme.desc: The first pump action shotgun - a Winchester Model 1897; a hunter's collection of prize big game, full-body taxidermy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Quadzilla Attacks!
programme.desc: Extreme Quadzilla ATV, the fastest 4 wheeler ever; a 1910s Remington Derringer and an 1880s Palm Squeezer pistol; revolutionary 1800s Western Electric telephone with a crank dial.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Reel Money
programme.desc: 1970's-era Fighting Chair used for big-game fishing; military MILES "laser tag" training system.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Drumming Up Cash
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face some silent but deadly competition at an auction in nearby Glendale. They discover a Zildjian brand percussion cymbal from the 1940's and a pyrotechnics control board designed for large-scale fireworks displays!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Got Balls
programme.desc: After returning to LA, Ton & Allen head deep into hostile auction hunter territory and butt heads with a familiar old foe! They discover a driving range golf ball picker vehicle and one of the most accurate rifles ever made!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hot Wheels
programme.desc: '70s sand rail dune racer with rally hemi heads; 1965 replica Mustang pool table; off-road racing gear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Weapons of Past Destruction
programme.desc: Knowing that Hollywood auctions are hit-and-miss, Allen and Ton buy inexpensive lockers that contain a polygraph machine, a samurai sword and a pair of Civil War shotguns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Dead Aim
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face-off against an auction buyer with shady bidding tactics and even more questionable fashion sense. The guys find a custom-built monowheel & a rifle designed to ward off grave robbers in the early 19th century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Diesel Digs
programme.desc: The guys head to the industrial hub of LA to score some heavy machinery and unearth a 1981 Bobcat 743 Frontloader, one of the first powered by a diesel engine and a trench-defending WWI German Sturmtrupp helmet bashing mace.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Bowling Pin Payday
programme.desc: Allen & Ton visit Ton's old stompin' ground and go head-to-head with a trash-talking auction buyer. They uncover a 19th century rifle with a matching cutlass bayonet and a mechanical bowling pinsetter from the early 1960's!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sin City Shootout
programme.desc: 1953 Chevy-inspired bumper car; scores of M16 30-round magazines; reproduction 1940s boardwalk photobooth; aerosol-powered spud gun potato launchers.

programme.title: Holiday in Your Heart
programme.desc: Fourteen-year-old LeAnn Rimes wants nothing more than to sing at the Grand Ole Opry. She is invited to sing at a Christmas concert on Nashville's famous stage, but upon her arrival, she is faced with a difficult decision.

programme.title: The Christmas Dragon
programme.desc: A group of orphans goes on a journey to restore the lost magic and save Christmas.

programme.title: Christmas Child
programme.desc: A life-sized nativity leads a man to learn about his past and lost family.

programme.title: Pete's Christmas
programme.desc: A put-upon teen finds himself reliving the same miserable Christmas day over and over again. Starring: Bruce Dern, Zachary Gordon, Molly Parker, Rick Roberts, Marshall Williams.

programme.title: Sarah's House: Living Room/entryway
programme.desc: A dark, cramped living room and foyer do nothing to add appeal to Sarah’s House. Sarah reconfigures the entire space, giving it the grandeur it lacks. Walls come down...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Kitchen/dining Room
programme.desc: A drab kitchen and mock tudor dining room do nothing to arouse the palate. Sarah knocks it into a vast, contemporary kitchen and dining room. Insider tips on finishes...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Basement
programme.desc: Low ceilings, chopped up rooms, damp and mold would turn most potential homebuyers away, but not Sarah! However...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Mudroom/laundry Room
programme.desc: A kid-friendly landing spot and a user-friendly laundry room are high on this house’s priority list. After a full basement excavation, Sarah carves out well-organized...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Curb Appeal
programme.desc: ‘Choose the worst house on the best street’ is good real estate advice and one look at Sarah’s choice shows she listened. Outdated windows, a listing porch, dry rot and an old retaining wall must be addressed to increase safety and curb appeal...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Grand Finale
programme.desc: The dust has settled and Sarah is the proud owner of a brand new house!! Sarah has proved that through solid planning, wise spending and a sense of humour that she can make a difference to her home...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Find + Buy
programme.desc: Sarah’s House is back and is taking on the suburbs! Over 13 episodes cameras track Sarah Richardson as she tackles the renovation of a typical back split room-by-room, bringing today’s sense and style to the entire space...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Nursery + Home Office
programme.desc: Sarah and Tommy squeeze practical style from two small, neglected rooms. The home office takes on a bold, comfortable tone, while the tiny high-ceilinged nursery becomes a serene study in whites, pale grays and blues...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Master Bedroom
programme.desc: This is one absolutely bland, beige and boring master. Sarah ups the comfort and romance factors, not before addressing moldy non-insulated closets, creaky, old wood floors...

programme.title: Sarah's House: High/low Bathrooms
programme.desc: After the kitchen, bathrooms are the most important and expensive renovations in the home. At Sarah’s House both family and basement baths give way to the wrecking ball; one becomes a showcase combination for the master...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Guest Suite
programme.desc: Another great idea from Sarah’s House! Sarah transforms unused basement space into a multi-purpose suite that works for temporary and long-term visitors, including the boomerang generation. This newly captured room brims with five-star features...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Storage, Laundry
programme.desc: Storage is one of the most important and complex issues in any home. Sarah makes every nook and cranny accountable by incorporating storage you don’t even notice is there. As for the laundry room, Sarah creates a colorful...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Backyard
programme.desc: Sarah steps up to a large yard untouched since the house was built. Stone work, landscaping and green space set the foundation for a jewel-like pool and cabana...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Tween Bedroom
programme.desc: A bare bones room at home anywhere. Sarah and Tommy set a budget challenge of $2,500 to bring this unused space up to the demanding specs of this fickle generation...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Family Room
programme.desc: Sarah breaks down the walls of this nowhere space to make a family room that serves a multitude of purposes. While the design scheme skews male, it’s meant to welcome all with comfort and style...

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Until the World Ends
programme.desc: The threat of coronavirus intensifies as Chelsea travels for work. Leah and the girls go into self-quarantine to protect Ali. Briana's new fling has the potential for major heartbreak. (S10, ep11)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Remote Control
programme.desc: Despite quarantine, Leah's book release pushes her and Jeremy to confront their past. Jade is forced to close her salon during lockdown. (S10, ep12)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Not So Normal Times
programme.desc: As the country emerges from quarantine, Briana struggles with the decision to send Nova back to school. Kail and Jo struggle with the decision to let Isaac have more say. (S10, ep13)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Bizarre New World
programme.desc: Kail gives birth to her 4th child. Chelsea worries about her health amid Cole's COVID-19 scare. Briana and Devoin fight about finances. Jade calls Sean out for being unmotivated. (S10, ep14)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Tongue-tied
programme.desc: Tensions erupt between Jade and Sean at Kloie's birthday dinner. After their intense text fight, Briana tries to put aside her anger with Devoin for Nova's birthday. (S10, ep15)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Say OK
programme.desc: Jade's frustrations force her to break up with Sean. Kailyn tries to co-parent through the stress of virtual learning. Chelsea gets busier as COVID-19 numbers spike in South Dakota. (S10, ep16)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Just Don't Sink It
programme.desc: Leah steps in when tensions between the twins boil over. Kailyn is forced to navigate the fallout of strong statements she made about Javi. (S10, ep17)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Under The Big Top
programme.desc: Chelsea makes a difficult decision about her future. Leah withdraws Gracie from cheer in order to keep Ali safe. Jade deals with Sean's messes after he breaks her window. (S10, ep18)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Spring Has Sprung
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Ashley takes an anniversary trip with her boyfriend. Leah receives life altering news about her health. Kail says goodbye to her old house and bittersweet memories. (S10, ep22)

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Aubrey
programme.desc: Aubrey and Brandon must find a home and start over in a new town, all while she tries to get her GED. They get married, but will their fresh start cause them to resent one another? (S2, ep16)

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Christinna
programme.desc: Christinna and Isiah have had to change their college plans as they prepare for their baby. His family is furious when he gives up his scholarship. Can they make it on their own?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Kayla
programme.desc: Kayla is a southern belle. Now that she's pregnant, she has to start making her own tough decisions about marriage and her ability to make it without the help of her parents.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Megan
programme.desc: While her dad's in Afghanistan, Megan gets pregnant. But with little money and a video game playing boyfriend not necessarily in for the long haul, she'll have to grow up fast.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Ashley
programme.desc: Ashley is a pregnant high school senior from Texas with no baby daddy weighing in, and a family encouraging her to choose adoption. But when the time comes, what will she decide?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Unseen Moments 2
programme.desc: Unseen moments from the episodes Brooke, Felicia, Emily, Markai, Aubrey, Christinna, Kayla, Megan, and Ashley.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Reunion
programme.desc: Dr. Drew hosts an emotional finale as the teen mothers from the latest series share a stage, coming together with their boyfriends & parents to talk about the issues they face.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Jordan
programme.desc: Jordan and her sister were models and best friends until Jordan's pregnancy put all that on hold. Now her boyfriend and her sister are competing to be her number one.

programme.title: Human Prey: Killers on the Loose
programme.desc: Gary Brown's visit to an African chimp sanctuary becomes a deadly struggle when he and his guide are attacked by the colony's escaped alpha male. Idaho Zoo's 'Feast for the Beast' fundraiser takes a bloody turn when a 600-pound Siberian tiger breaks free.

programme.title: 21 Grams
programme.desc: When a horrific accident traumatically binds three people's lives together, events unfold that take them to the heights of passion, the depths of obsession and the promise of revenge. 21 Grams is a bold, multi-layered, extraordinary cinematic experience.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: The Human Duplicators
programme.desc: An alien takes over a professor's mansion-basement laboratory, and makes android clones to infiltrate the government.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Tourist Trap

programme.title: Cocomelon: Animal Songs
programme.desc: In Cocomelon, baby JJ and his siblings go on fun every-day adventures with nursery, play, exploration and learning - situations which any pre-schooler could relate to. Fun, relatable stories set to catchy songs.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Mega Cities
programme.desc: Mega Cities provide a bustling home to populations of over 10 million. Travel from the high-density living of Shanghai and Bangkok to the sprawling cities of Delhi and Mexico City, each the backdrop for dynamic cultures.

programme.title: Arthur: Big Brother Binky, Parts I&II
programme.desc: Binky's family has decided to adopt a little girl from China. The thought of a baby sister makes Binky happy, until he realized there are some changes in store. It’s a lot harder than he thought, but it has its rewards too.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Courtney & Isaak
programme.desc: Courtney broke up with Isaak, who she met online. He's doing everything to get her back. Beauty queen Cassidy Wolf joins Nev to get Isaak to leave Courtney alone for good. (S4, ep2)

programme.title: 48 Hours: Over the Edge
programme.desc: A report on the investigation into the 2009 disappearance of Dawn Viens, and why her husband, California chef David Viens, jumped off a cliff when he became a suspect in her disappearance.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Strat'ed for Cash
programme.desc: On a limited budget in the historic L.A. neighborhood of West Adams, Allen and Ton still win three lockers and find a Maui Blue Fender Stratocaster and a 1930s Schwinn bike.

programme.title: Best Christmas Party Ever
programme.desc: Jennie Stanton (Torrey DeVitto) throws the best Christmas parties every year for her company, Petra's Parties.

programme.title: Sarah's House: Exterior/finale
programme.desc: After seeing how the farm’s exterior has come together, Sarah finally learns how much value her hard work has added to the once modest farmhouse...

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Cut Out
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Jade recovers at Briana's house, but has to make a decision about her family. Kail juggles three different co-parenting relationships. (S10, ep30)

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Kianna
programme.desc: With an immature boyfriend and a distant mum, Kianna wants more stability for her baby and considers adoption. When no one supports her decision, she must figure out how to be a good parent.

programme.title: Secrets of the Deep: WWII Beaufighters
programme.desc: A dogfight lasting a mere 15 minutes over Norwegian fields during WWII. 60 years later, the fjords still guard the secrets of the ten allied planes that were shot down. It is now one of the most important sites in aviation archaeology.

programme.title: Secrets of the Deep: Shipwreck Treasure
programme.desc: Treasure hunters scour the ocean floor in search of shipwrecks and lost riches. The waters off the Florida Keys still hold some of these riches, even a king’s ransom, just waiting to be found.

programme.title: Secrets of the Deep: Sunken Cities
programme.desc: Cities swept into the sea, civilizations lost beneath the waves, but is Atlantis more than a myth? Are there real sunken cities waiting to be discovered? Today, new technology is helping to find lost societies around the globe.

programme.title: Secrets of the Deep: Wrecksploitation
programme.desc: There are more than 3,000,000 shipwrecks in the world, each one with a unique story. The age-old battle between treasure hunters and archaeologists continues to rage as more and more of these wrecks are uncovered.

programme.title: Germany's Underworld: From the Alps to the River Rhine
programme.desc: This is a journey through Germany’s rivers, streams and lakes, from the snow-clad peaks of the Alps to the River Rhine. The force of the water creates wondrous ice caves, spectacular waterfalls and extraordinary turquoise lakes.
programme.sub-title: From the Alps to the River Rhine

programme.title: Germany's Underworld: From the Harz Mountain to the North Sea
programme.desc: We follow the migration of an ancient fish, the Atlantic sturgeon, and meet hunters, like the ground beetle and the sea eagle. On the banks of the river, a family of beavers explore the surroundings around their underwater lodge.
programme.sub-title: From the Harz Mountain to the North Sea

programme.title: Human Prey: Killers on the Loose
programme.desc: Gary Brown's visit to an African chimp sanctuary becomes a deadly struggle when he and his guide are attacked by the colony's escaped alpha male. Idaho Zoo's 'Feast for the Beast' fundraiser takes a bloody turn when a 600-pound Siberian tiger breaks free.

programme.title: What's Eating Gilbert Grape
programme.desc: Gilbert feels trapped - with no father present and an eccentric family to care for, he is struggling to cope. Despite the hardships Gilbert perseveres, but will he be able to live his own life?

programme.title: Alpha Dog
programme.desc: Inspired by true events, Alpha Dog follows three fateful days when the lives of a group of Southern California teens suddenly dead-ended. The film features a powerful ensemble cast including Sharon Stone, Justin Timberlake, Anton Yelchin and Bruce Willis.

programme.title: Animal Factory
programme.desc: A young man goes to prison and a tough, older convict takes him under his wing as a mentor.

programme.title: Dark Blue
programme.desc: Spring, 1992. Days before the trial on the Rodney King LA riots... Eldon Perry struggles with the racially charged violence erupting around him.

programme.title: 21 Grams
programme.desc: When a horrific accident traumatically binds three people's lives together, events unfold that take them to the heights of passion, the depths of obsession and the promise of revenge. 21 Grams is a bold, multi-layered, extraordinary cinematic experience.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Girl in Gold Boots
programme.desc: A girl from rural California goes to Los Angeles to work as a go-go dancer, but soon gets involved with drug dealers.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Manhunt In Space
programme.desc: Manhunt In Space: An early episode of the soap opera behemoth General Hospital plus a movie made of several TV episodes about space pirates.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: The Castle of Fu Manchu
programme.desc: The Castle of Fu Manchu tries to conquer the world by turning all water into ice.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Untamed Youth
programme.desc: Joel invents a pipe with a smoke detector and a sprinkler system built in for the invention exchange. The guys watch a 1950s teen flick about youths sentenced to manual labor at a cotton farm.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: The Human Duplicators
programme.desc: An alien takes over a professor's mansion-basement laboratory, and makes android clones to infiltrate the government.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Planet of Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Planet of Dinosaurs: When a spaceship full of hairy people crashes on an unknown planet, they must forge off on a non-stop mission of wandering around doing nothing in particular.

programme.title: Total Riff Off Episode 6: Brazilian Bigfoot
programme.desc: From the stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 comes RiffTrax, hilarious audio commentaries for your favorite - and not-so-favorite - movies!

programme.title: Frankenstein Island
programme.desc: Directed by B-Movie "icon" Jerry Warren, this is a riffing journey you don't want to miss. And so with great trepidation, Mike, Kevin and Bill hop into a hot air balloon and head off into the wild blue yonder to riff Frankenstein Island!

programme.title: Total Riff Off Episode 4: Man V. Monster
programme.desc: From the stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 comes RiffTrax, hilarious audio commentaries for your favorite - and not-so-favorite - movies!

programme.title: RiffTrax: Tourist Trap
programme.desc: Capitalizing on the widely-publicized series of unsolved murders that occurred at the Liberace Museum in Las Vegas in the late 1970s*, Tourist Trap is a slasher film with all the classic elements.

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: Mermaid Fritter
programme.desc: Zig and Bernie come back from hunting empty-handed and a lot worse for wear. Bernie is fed up. He wants a quiet life. He comes up with a plan to convince Zig he has eaten the mermaid…

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: Bionic Zig
programme.desc: After picking up the pieces each time Zig tries to catch the mermaid, Bernie decides to 'reinforce' his friend. Presenting the new Bionic Zig! Zig is sure he's invincible and no longer fears Sharko: the mermaid shall be his!

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: A Sweet Tooth
programme.desc: Marina is crazy for candy! Zig has found the ideal bait to lure her into his clutches! Sharko has his work cut out for him. He must protect his sweetheart while teaching her the basics of healthy eating.

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: Teen Rebels
programme.desc: Zig finds an old skateboard in a crate. It awakens memories, taking him back to when he, Bernie, Sharko and Marina were teenagers, and all they only cared about were stunts on wheels…

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: The Mummy
programme.desc: A pyramid is discovered on the beach! Marina races inside. Zig and Sharko follow. Marina finds a chamber with a very friendly mummy, while Zig and Sharko get hammered by endless booby traps ...

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: Bosom Buddies
programme.desc: Why are the hyena and the hermit crab such good friends? It turns out that in the past a would-be 'mama' raised them side by side…

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: Zig Top Chef
programme.desc: Sharko is a hopeless cook. He decides to train with the best chef on the island: Zig! They get busy with pots, pans, fresh ingredients and exotic herbs. Marina's right there, eager to taste every dish. But she's the one dish Zig wants to taste…

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: High Wired
programme.desc: Marina aims to enter the Book of Records by tightrope-walking the longest distance ever. Sharko is terrified of heights... Zig sees an opportunity to nab the mermaid, beyond the shark's reach!

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: Let's Dance!!
programme.desc: A night club opens at the edge of the beach! And since Marina loves to dance, Zig takes advantage to track the mermaid to the sound of the music, much to Sharko's dismay. Let's dance!

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: LOL Zig
programme.desc: A chase between Zig and Sharko ends with the hyena getting covered in pizza. Haha! Marina takes a picture and posts it on social networks. Unexpectedly, the photo makes Zig the Star of the Beach...LOL!

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: The Fall
programme.desc: Zig uses a human-cannonball stunt starring Marina as the ball, aiming to fire her into his cargo-plane. But Sharko is watching over her. The canon explodes and shoots all three of them into space. A long fall back to Earth ensues, full of surprises.

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: The Curse
programme.desc: A mummy tries - unsuccessfully - to sell charms and knick-knacks on the beach. When the mummy sees Zig (in dreadful shape), it thinks it has found the perfect pigeon, and fobs off a 'magical' talisman …

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: Rolling, Action!
programme.desc: To trap Marina, Bernie organizes a movie shoot where Zig and the mermaid play their real life roles for the camera. Sharko is furious: he isn't selected for the cast! But Bernie is going to take his director's job too seriously.

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: The Toothpaste
programme.desc: When Sharko's asleep, Zig slips a stinky cheese into his mouth. Marina, repulsed by his breath, takes off fast. Just as Zig is about to pounce on her, Sharko takes toothpaste out of his pocket! Problem solved.

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: King of the Animal World
programme.desc: Giant lizards show up on the beach to protect Zig from any harm. For them the hyena is at the top of the food chain and deserves some respect! Zig is delighted but his bodyguards have other plans…

programme.title: Zig & Sharko
programme.desc: Sharko and Marina are watching a vampire movie, which spooks them. Zig and Bernie decide to use vampire tactics to terrify Sharko and kidnap the mermaid. But it's not easy playing Dracula…

programme.title: Bangkok Fight Nights: Episode 9
programme.desc: Thousands flock to witness the incredible Muay Thai events put on by Bangkok Fight Night every week. The combination of the unique location, hard hitting action and curious onlookers make Bangkok Fight Night an unforgettable experience.

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 186

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 6

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 141
programme.desc: Can a person jump from a rooftop into a dumpster and walk away? Can a deep-sea diver's body be crushed into his helmet if his air hose breaks?

programme.title: Fear Factor: Flying High, Junkyard Canine Attack, Vertical Bus Drop
programme.desc: Contestants are harnessed and locked into a computer ratchet system. Couples will make their way through junkyard obstacles, retrieving hubcaps. The male contestants will be standing on top of a bus while their female partners are strapped under the bus.
programme.sub-title: Flying High, Junkyard Canine Attack, Vertical Bus Drop

programme.title: Fear Factor: Tug Of War, Roach Cage Escape, Barrels Off Truck
programme.desc: It's age vs. youth in this special episode! Contestants will be sealed into a cage filled with roaches. The cage will be locked on the outside. Contestants will also drive behind a truck while their opponents are releasing barrels to distract them.
programme.sub-title: Tug Of War, Roach Cage Escape, Barrels Off Truck

programme.title: Fear Factor: Hurricane Ledge Walk, Roach Bob and Eat, Raging Waters
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on a building ledge as a wind and rain storm inhibits their movement. Contestants must bob their heads into a container to retrieve cockroaches with their mouth. Couples will be on their stomachs on a flash flood set.
programme.sub-title: Hurricane Ledge Walk, Roach Bob and Eat, Raging Waters

programme.title: Fear Factor: Body Weights, Picnic Basket, Train Drag
programme.desc: Special blind date episode! Couples will be presented with a picnic baskets filled with a Fear Factor style meal. One contestant will be underneath the train at the back of a car, while her partner will be on the side of the same car.
programme.sub-title: Body Weights, Picnic Basket, Train Drag

programme.title: Fear Factor: Pig Pen, Rotisserie Chicken In A Basket, Tractor Pull and Escape
programme.desc: Stunts takes place in a rectangular pig pen filled with pigs. A couple is placed back-to back and attached to an upright rotisserie. One contestant will be dragged through a field of mud.
programme.sub-title: Pig Pen, Rotisserie Chicken In A Basket, Tractor Pull and Escape

programme.title: Fear Factor: Boat Lean and Grab, Scorpion Helmet Spin, Truck Switch
programme.desc: Ex Factor! Contestants must grab scorpions, cross a balance beam on a moving boat, and plow through obstacles with a twist: Their partners will be their exes.
programme.sub-title: Boat Lean and Grab, Scorpion Helmet Spin, Truck Switch

programme.title: Fear Factor: Dual Dunk, Isolation Barrel, Car Mine Field
programme.desc: Celebrity edition! Contestants will hang by their ankles from a crane above the water. Contestants must also drive on a swervy course while trying to run through a series of barrels and wooden structures.
programme.sub-title: Dual Dunk, Isolation Barrel, Car Mine Field

programme.title: Fear Factor: Descender Jump/Eat Sheep's Eye/Water Tank
programme.desc: Contestant will hang from a bar placed outside a 12th story window and drop by a descender line. Each contestant will be asked to eat three sheep's eyes in three minutes. Each contestant is lowered by their feet head first into a water tank.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: A Tale of Two Pilots
programme.desc: Weighed down by the responsibility of training a new rampie, and struggling to get out of Joe's doghouse, DC-3 co-pilot Tyler gets a once in a lifetime opportunity to stunt fly in his Cessna 150 for a visiting film crew.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Ice Jam
programme.desc: After taking command of an intense airlift, and dealing with the ugliest Electra load he's ever seen, Scott takes a scary fall on the icy tarmac. City girl Christine moves to Yellowknife to give the unglamorous rampie life a shot.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: A Very Buffalo Christmas
programme.desc: A week before Christmas, Buffalo agrees to lend a hand to an RCMP initiative to fly toys to isolated communities in the north. But a series of problems with the Electra leave the company in a jam.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Crash Landing
programme.desc: Captain Ray Weber leads his crew on a multi-trip mission that requires landing on a rough ice strip on a remote lake. The ice strip landing goes fine, but when the plane takes off from the strip, the right landing gear gets stuck in the wheel well.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: For Sale By Owner
programme.desc: When South Korean buyers come to Buffalo to look at a water bomber, the pressure is on mechanic Cory to get the plane ready. But a landing gear emergency puts him and chief pilot Justin in serious danger.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Over Seas
programme.desc: Buffalo has to get a CL-215 water bomber to buyers in Korea. So Justin and Cory fly the plane to Vancouver Harbour, where it will be hoisted onto a cargo ship sailing across the Pacific Ocean to its destinatin, a method of delivery no one has ever tried.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Water Wings
programme.desc: In South Korea, Cory and Justin meet the ship delivering Buffalo's water bomber plane to buyers there but are frustrated by the buyers' poor planning. Tempers flare when they try to get the plane off the ship and delivered to its final destination

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Meltdown
programme.desc: As spring arrives and Ray's retirement day approaches, Sean surprises everyone by leaving Buffalo for a job with the competition. So Buffalo brings in Electra pilot Brian Harrison to finish the contract.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: Royal Academy’s Comeback Part 2!
programme.desc: Raimon are smack in the middle of a game against Royal Academy Redux, and Ray Dark has convinced its players to use any and every means to win; even if it means the destruction of their minds and bodies.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The Last Wyvern Blizzard!
programme.desc: The Inazuma Caravan finally comes home to recharge their batteries and…train a whole lot more. They find out that everybody’s been training to help them, including some old enemies!

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: Erik Eagle in Serious Trouble!
programme.desc: No sooner do they arrive home, and they’re back on the road again - this time they’re heading to Osaka where it’s rumoured that Alius Academy have a base.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: Dvalin’s Trap!
programme.desc: The team find that the Golden Glamour Girls’ secret training bunker under the amusement park is a great place to train, but where did it come from?

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: Epsilon - The Toughest Battle Yet!
programme.desc: The big game against Epsilon is here, and Raimon come out with all guns blazing! Will their guns be enough to turn back the alien scourge?

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: Grandpa’s Secret Trick!
programme.desc: Unexpected news about the existence of another David Evans notebook sends the team scurrying off to Fukuoka, where they meet one of Mark’s grandfather’s old friends, and someone who might just become Mark’s apprentice.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The Other Majin the Hand!
programme.desc: The exhibition game between Raimon and Fauxshore Jr - AKA the battle of the goalies - is a knuckle biting affair. Both Mark and Darren are showing off their old moves and trying to learn new ones while a storm of shots rages around them.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: Seismic Earthquake Shocker!
programme.desc: Just when Raimon were feeling confident, they get a wake up call in the form of a big slap in the face from Xavier and his Genesis team. Sure, part of being a winning team is being able to cope with loss, but a loss this big?

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The Captain’s Test!
programme.desc: Disaster after disaster is hitting the Raimon team hard. First Nathan decides to quit, then another member decides he can't take it anymore. Mark is in crisis and can't deal with everything that’s happening.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The Great Battle in the Southern Sea
programme.desc: On the way to Okinawa, the team are waylaid when Willy’s scientific curiosity gets the better of him. The meeting proves fruitful though, as they encounter a surfer with a kick like a jet engine!
programme.sub-title: The Great Battle in the Southern Sea

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The Flame Striker
programme.desc: Raimon have arrived in Okinawa to begin their search for the Flame Striker. Most of the team are convinced it’s Axel, but they won't know until they see him. Hold on, who’s this guy?

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The Radical Rhythmic Soccer Game
programme.desc: Mark and the boys successfully put the nightmare of Xavier behind them, and now it’s time to have some fun. But fun always means soccer and they’re off to a game with Mary Times High, who Hurley’s decided to play for.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The Fist of Justice!
programme.desc: Raimon are in trouble against Mary Times and their amazing rhythmic style of play. They better find a way to mix up the timing before they’re drummed out of the game entirely!

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: Epsilon’s Counterattack!
programme.desc: Just when they thought it was safe to go back on the soccer field, Raimon are besieged by the aliens once more. It’s Epsilon again, but not as they know it. Their power has increased and they’re nastier than ever.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The Fire Revival!
programme.desc: Unsurprisingly, Epsilon Prime are wiping the floor with Raimon Jr, but their spirits can't be broken. If they all pull together and work hard and have fun, they can beat these aliens and save their earth. Or can they?

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When the guys accidentally break Holly's vibrator, they scramble to fix it before she finds out so it doesn't ruin their friendship.

programme.title: The Man Who Sued God
programme.desc: Billy Connolly plays Steve Myers, a lawyer who became a fisherman from frustration. When his one piece of property, his boat, is struck by lightning and destroyed, he is denied insurance money because it was 'an act of God'. He re-registers as a lawyer.

programme.title: Unlikely Hero
programme.desc: A washed-up writer forms an unlikely friendship with a teenager from Long Island. Starring: Jeff Daniels, Emma Stone, Ryan Reynolds, Lisa Kudrow, Kieran Culkin

programme.title: While We're Young
programme.desc: A middle-aged couple's career and marriage are overturned when a disarming young couple enters their lives.

programme.title: Celebrity
programme.desc: The fortunes of a husband and wife differ drastically after they divorce. Starring: Kenneth Branagh, Judy Davis, Leonardo DiCaprio, Greg Mottola, Melanie Griffith, Douglas McGrath, Charlize Theron

programme.title: Monster
programme.desc: After a massive earthquake in Tokyo, two American filmmakers document the true cause of the destruction.

programme.title: Bound
programme.desc: The daughter of a wealthy real estate broker falls in love with a younger man, who introduces her to BDSM. Using her newly awakened sexual prowess, she finally takes charge of her own life.

programme.title: The Land that Time Forgot
programme.desc: A modern adaptation of the classic novel about the survivors of a shipwreck who are trapped on an island teeming with dinosaurs.

programme.title: The Legend of Bloody Jack
programme.desc: Campfire urban legend Bloody Jack comes to life when one of his kin resurrects him from the dead.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Poltergeist Haunting The Station Hotel - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation at The Station Hotel and it appears his presence is not welcomed by the spirits. This is one experience of the paranormal that leaves a mark in Sean's memory forever.
programme.sub-title: Poltergeist Haunting The Station Hotel - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Haunted escape room at Moviescape - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to a haunted escape room attraction and although the sets are dressed to scare, something more sinister seems to be lurking here. Will Sean escape unscathed tonight?
programme.sub-title: Haunted escape room at Moviescape - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation of the escape rooms and investigates the haunted bible and radio. Prepare for a fright when Sean and Paul join forces and witness paranormal activity firsthand
programme.sub-title: Haunted escape room at Moviescape - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Spirits in command at Welkin Mill
programme.desc: Sean heads into Stockport, Greater Manchester and travels to Welkin Mill. He investigates claims of paranormal activity which also appear to be linked to his previous investigation of Moviescape.
programme.sub-title: Spirits in command at Welkin Mill

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Will it All Go Pear Shaped at Pear Mill? - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Stockport to investigate a haunted mill, which has a lift with a mind all of its own. Will any of the ghosts haunting the mill join him on the investigation tonight or will it all go pear shaped?
programme.sub-title: Will it All Go Pear Shaped at Pear Mill? - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Will it All Go Pear Shaped at Pear Mill? - Pear 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation of the mill and is attacked by a spirit. Jane joins the investigation with surprising results. Will it have a happy ending?
programme.sub-title: Will it All Go Pear Shaped at Pear Mill? - Pear 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Forgotten Souls of Errwood Hall
programme.desc: Sean heads to the Errwood Hall ruins in the Goyt Valley. It is said to be haunted by 3 spirits, and that it has its very own time slip. The investigation does not disappoint and although the hall is gone, the spirits remain.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries: The Jughead Incident
programme.desc: Government agents are convinced by Jughead's eccentric behavior that he is an advance scout for an alien invasion fleet.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries: Virtually Evil
programme.desc: Evil monsters from a virtual reality game break out and materialize in Riverdale!

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries: Zombies of Love
programme.desc: Veronica doesn't think that Archie dotes on her enough, so she visits a witchy woman who gives her a magic potion.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries: Brain of Terror
programme.desc: Moose is close to being cut from the football team unless he is able to bring his grades up.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries: Twisted Youth
programme.desc: Archie and the gang get a taste of what it's like to deal with teenagers when Mr. Weatherbee, Mr. Lodge and Miss Grundy drink bottles of contaminated water, causing them to revert to their wild teenage selves.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries: Compu-Terror
programme.desc: Archie is temporarily unable to type, so Reggie offers to write the Weird Mystery article for the school paper.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries: Monster in the Night
programme.desc: A monstrous man of incredible strength is making evening appearances in Riverdale.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries: Misfortune Hunters
programme.desc: Betty begins to mysteriously receive fortune cookies that instruct her to carry out simple good deeds each of which leads to a reward.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries: Ship of Ghouls
programme.desc: When a sunken treasure is found off the coast of Riverdale, Reggie succumbs to the greedy curse of the pirate's gold.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries: Something is Haunting Riverdale High
programme.desc: Spooky and mysterious things are happening at Riverdale High.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries: Supreme Girl vs. Dr. Arachnid
programme.desc: Dr. Arachnid, an evil supervillain, has come to Riverdale to commit some dastardly deeds.

programme.title: Flash Gordon: New Adventures: Marooned on Mongo
programme.desc: Earth teenagers Flash Gordon and Dale Arden, and their reluctant friend Dr. Zarkov, journey to the fantastic planet Mongo where they fight to defeat the evil planetary dictator, Ming the Merciless.

programme.title: Flash Gordon: New Adventures: Jaws of the Jungle
programme.desc: Flash, Dale and Dr. Zarkov rescue the Lionid Princess Thundar from Ming and the treacherous Vine People. This feat earns them the respect of Prince Talon and renews the rebellion against Ming.

programme.title: Flash Gordon: New Adventures: The Caves of Doom
programme.desc: Flash races time to save Dale and Dr. Zarkov from being sacrificed to a volcano by the Trogs, a tribe of suspicious cave dwellers.

programme.title: Flash Gordon: New Adventures: Vandals from the Void
programme.desc: When Mongo is attacked by a fleet of UFOs, only Flash questions Ming's attempts to form an alliance with the Rebel forces.

programme.title: Eat Yourself Sexy: Denise
programme.desc: Denise’s dismal diet is dimming her mojo and destroying her health. The busy mother of four wants her once-buff body back. But will she stick to Gillian’s plan? And can she convince the whole family that change is good?

programme.title: Eat Yourself Sexy: Erika
programme.desc: A stressed out, overworked, carb- and sugar-junkie, 46-year-old Erika is clinically obese, suffers from type-2 diabetes, and is disgusted by her bulging body.

programme.title: Eat Yourself Sexy: Jennifer
programme.desc: Booze-binging Jen dreams of being a sexy, confident siren…But at 5’9” and 225 lbs, the soda sipping, junk food junkie is clinically obese, her mojo is MIA, and she’s worried her new boyfriend will eventually tire of making love in the dark.

programme.title: Eat Yourself Sexy: Annalisa
programme.desc: With her cake-a-day habit and constant craving for pickles, pop, and pasta, 34-year-old Annalisa’s 5’5” frame has ballooned to 215 lbs. And although the once svelte mother of two can’t stand the skin she’s in,

programme.title: Eat Yourself Sexy: Frances
programme.desc: Bulging bride-to-be Frances dreams of wowing her groom when she walks down the aisle. But at 5’9”, and 330 pounds, the 28-year-old is miserable and morbidly obese, and would rather order take out than make out.

programme.title: Bizarre E.R. Series: Episode 9
programme.desc: A butcher is impaled on a meat hook. A woman breaks her hip killing a wasp. A gardener's fingers are lacerated by a lawnmower. Medics save a scalped man.

programme.title: Bizarre E.R. Series: Episode 10
programme.desc: A sow charges a pig handler. A trumpeter takes off the top of her finger with a bike chain. A pensioner mistakes olbas oil for eye drops. A man has his scalp shaved off after a car crash.

programme.title: Bizarre E.R. Series: Episode 1
programme.desc: A man barbecues his own buttocks. A builder is impaled through the thigh on a pole. A footballer's kneecap faces the wrong way. Medical professionals confess their most bizarre and outrageous cases.

programme.title: Bizarre E.R. Series: Episode 2
programme.desc: A driver is run over by the mechanic sent to repair his car. A schoolgirl is injured playing "Wii Sports: Tennis". A man's testicles are squashed in a motorbike crash.

programme.title: Hit By A Train
programme.desc: A mountain biker has multiple injuries and her boyfriend has multiple fainting spells; a man's legs are severed when he's run over by a train; a drunken bachelor helps reveal the secret of a mystery nurse that has been working in the ER.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Turtle Trouble
programme.desc: An alligator snapping turtle is clamped to a man's neck and won't let go; an ER physician races against an impending hurricane to clear the ER of patients before it hits; and a tree trimmer is 20 feet above ground when he is impaled by his chainsaw.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy see properties in Ripon and Dover.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy view a property in Wales, a cottage in Kent and a big house with a problem in Ripon.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a one-bedroom terrace in Kent, a holiday cottage on the coast of Norfolk and a bland property in London.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy view a three-bed semi in South London, a flat in Gravesend and a house in Plymouth.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts and Lucy Alexander view a cottage in Kent and three-bedroom terrace in Derby.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy view houses in Cardiff, Redding and Derby.

programme.title: Snowballing
programme.desc: The Monroe High School senior class have a wild time on their skiing vacation. Eager to hit the slopes and enter the resort's skiing competition, the students' plans turn into something treacherous.

programme.title: Confessions of A Sex Maniac
programme.desc: A sex-crazed young architect decides that he wants to design a building shaped like the perfect breast, so he searches all over London for a woman who bears the perfect model.

programme.title: Confessions from the David Galaxy Affair
programme.desc: Twin British sex-bombs Mary Millington and Rosemary England take on an astrologer who can bed women as easily as he can read fortunes! No-one goes home a Virgo - and Diana Dors adds to the glam!

programme.title: Great American Sex Scandal
programme.desc: A shy accountant is charged with embezzlement, but an overtly sexual testimony by a secretary paints him in a different light. Jurors are trapped when a trial suddenly turns into a tabloid field day. Starring: Mädchen Amick, Stephen Baldwin.

programme.title: Confessions of A Sex Maniac
programme.desc: A sex-crazed young architect decides that he wants to design a building shaped like the perfect breast, so he searches all over London for a woman who bears the perfect model.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30: Taco Night
programme.desc: Have a fun, inexpensive, 30-minute fiesta in the kitchen with chef Spencer Watts’ favourite taco night recipes.

programme.title: Licence to Grill: The Martini Birthday
programme.desc: It’s Kathy’s 29th birthday (again!) and Rob goes all-martini in his bbq menu. He puts together everything from a martini marinated salmon on cedar plank with a tarragon mayo to a martini marinated leg of lamb. It’s a neat BBQ with a twist!

programme.title: Licence to Grill: The BBQ For No Reason
programme.desc: You don’t always need a special occasion to have people over for a bbq. Just lots of sun, food and friends! Rob prepares some staples – grilled chicken and ribs with garlic grilled tomatoes on the side.

programme.title: Licence to Grill: Parents Night Out
programme.desc: Rob’s friends haven’t been out since the birth of their first child six weeks ago. In celebration of their first night out, Rob goes all out with a shellfish fiesta.

programme.title: Licence to Grill: The Baseball Pulled Pork
programme.desc: Rob and the boys have a victory dinner of pulled pork, grilled pork tenderloin with great sauces and smokey south western rice as a side after a successful day at the softball tournament.

programme.title: Licence to Grill: Nothing But Chicken
programme.desc: Rob demonstrates how to do chicken up with style on the grill. He and his friends enjoy a poultry feast with BBQ rotisserie chicken, grilled flattened chicken and delicious smoked sides.

programme.title: Licence to Grill: The Blind Date and Garlic
programme.desc: The girls set Robs lifelong bachelor buddy up on a blind date and Rob decides to bbq mega garlic. Grilled veggies with garlic anchovy dip, grilled trout wrapped in Proscuitto with a roasted garlic mayo and a fresh nicoise salad.

programme.title: Licence to Grill: The Mediterranean Feast
programme.desc: New neighbors move in across the street all the way from Southern Italy and Rob decides to do an all-Mediterranean bbq dinner in their honour. Hot of the grill are octopus, sardines and Moroccan lamb kabobs along with some mouthwatering sides.

programme.title: Licence to Grill: Karaoke Slow Ribs
programme.desc: It’s karaoke night at Robs place. That means lots of bad singing and lots of great food. It’s a ribapolooza! Rob bbqs some smoked spareribs, spicy beef short ribs and fresh grilled veg for his wanna be stars.

programme.title: Licence to Grill: The Engagement
programme.desc: Rob prepares a special romantic dinner for one of his pals who is planning on popping the big marriage question to his date. They wine and dine on a gourmet meal including zucchini crab cakes with smoked salsa, grilled lobster with basil mayonnaise.

programme.title: Licence to Grill: Lunar Eclipse
programme.desc: There’s a total eclipse of the moon out tonight and everyone is coming over to Rob’s for the big show. In the darkness they feast on grilled chicken tikka, pork tenderloin with a banana salsa, and fabulous grilled fennel with anchovy - garlic butter.

programme.title: Licence to Grill: The Block Party
programme.desc: Every year the neighborhood gets together for a summer afternoon block party. This year it’s at Robs place. He makes a great impression with a menu that dazzles including oyster kabobs, spicy chicken wings, pork skewers, and more.

programme.title: Licence to Grill: Hawaiian Luau
programme.desc: Looking sexy in his grass skirt, Rob and his fish monger friend Jim Foster hang up their surf boards and throw a great Hawaiian Luau. They prepare a feast including kaluah pork, cowabunga shrimp and some freshly grilled fennel and orange salad.

programme.title: Licence to Grill: Mardi Gras Party
programme.desc: Rob throws a hot Mardi Gras party with a Cajun Creole Menu. There’s no parade, but there is great food, fabulous music and beads galore! Skillet Cornbread, Cajun catfish, and creole smoked ribs get this party going an keep it going all night long.

programme.title: Licence to Grill: Bar-Beef-Cue Celebration
programme.desc: Men love beer. Men love fire. Men love to eat. Put it all together and you get a backyard full of men feasting off of a beer inspired barbecued meal including roasted chicken on a beer can, beer wings, beer burgers and even a beer dressing.

programme.title: Hunter: City of Passion - Part 1
programme.desc: Erik Estrada guest stars as a tough-minded detective who joins Hunter and McCall to catch a serial rapist while also investigating the disappearance of a teenage prostitute.

programme.title: Hunter: City of Passion - Part 2
programme.desc: A serial rapist known as Big Foot stalks McCall while Hunter investigates the death of a teenage prostitute who may have had ties to a Satanic cult.

programme.title: Hunter: City of Passion - Part 3
programme.desc: McCall risks losing her job when she fails to report a felony and Hunter tries to trap the killer of a teenage prostitute with possible ties to a Satanic cult.

programme.title: Hunter: The Turning Point
programme.desc: When Hunter and McCall investigate the alleged death of a reporter, they uncover an extortion plot involving a wealthy industrialist who has illicit dealings with a construction firm.

programme.title: Hunter: Hot Prowl
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall become suspicious when a Bel Air housewife refuses to identify the man who robbed her of a million-dollar necklace.

programme.title: Hunter: Allegra
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall investigate the mysterious death of Allegra, Hunter's former girlfriend, to determine if the beautiful young heiress jumped or was pushed from a skyscraper window.

programme.title: Hunter: Renegade
programme.desc: When Hunter investigates a drug ring, his ex-partner, Frank Garriman, becomes a suspect in the murder of the dealers.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tim Shaw visits Pit Start, a fully-stocked repair shop with a twist — there are no mechanics.

programme.title: Fifth Gear

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Sling Shot
programme.desc: Soviet Luna 3 was the first to use gravity to change course to photograph the dark side of the Moon. NASA Mariner 10 used the technique to swing by Venus to target Mercury. The gravity sling shot maneuver has become a standard for space navigation.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Living Planet

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Cosmic Collisions
programme.desc: Space is vast, yet it is full of collisions. Gas and dust electrostatically flock together, and gravity takes over coalescing grains into rocks. Those rocks become boulders, then asteroids colliding again and again, striking planets and each other.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity keeps us on the ground and the planets in their orbits, yet we only notice it when it's not there. In space we cheat gravity; falling just as fast but missing the ground. Now this fundamental universal force is slowly giving up its secrets.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Interface
programme.desc: The interface between Earth and space is the Ionosphere, a region of rarified gas and charged particles. It is very important for radio communications, radar, satellite signals and global positioning. Yet we know so little about it.

programme.title: Beyond Earth

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: From There to Here

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Return to the Moon

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Inner Worlds

programme.title: Beauty and the Geek Australia: Episode 2
programme.desc: The nine remaining beauties make a splash in a sticky spelling bee. The nine geeks get behind the camera for a surprising photo-shoot with their beauties in which they have to impress judges Brynne Edelsten and Toby Burrowes.

programme.title: Beauty and the Geek Australia: Episode 3
programme.desc: The eight remaining geeks perform a variety of tasks to see which of them is the toughest guy. Immunity is offered to the first geek to get their nipple pierced.

programme.title: Beauty and the Geek Australia: Episode 4
programme.desc: The seven remaining geeks are challenged to each take on a professional wrestler in the ring, having to come up with a wrestling name, outfit and signature move. The beauties have to polish up their social etiquette as they experience high society.

programme.title: Beauty and the Geek Australia: Episode 5
programme.desc: The six remaining beauties and geeks compete in a joint challenge in the form of a beauty pageant, where the geeks appear in a catwalk parade dressed only in Budgy Smuggler swimwear.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Anita Cobby Murder
programme.desc: In February 1986, nurse Anita Cobby, a former entrant in the Miss Australia quest, is walking home from Blacktown station in Sydney's outer-western suburbs. A Holden sedan pulls up and Anita is dragged into the vehicle.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Butchered Boys
programme.desc: This episode revisits Adelaide's notorious Adelaide Family Murders case, where six young Adelaide men were murdered during the 1970s and '80s. The victims were found in random locations throughout the state, their bodies neatly cut into pieces.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Snowtown: Bodies in the Barrels
programme.desc: In 1999, eight bodies are found in six barrels filled with acid in a former bank vault in rural Snowtown, 50 kilometres north of Adelaide.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Contract to Kill / The Mornington Monster
programme.desc: Crime Investigation Australia has conducted a major investigation which reveals the inside story of the Megan Kalajzich murder and the extraordinary police investigation which will rock the Harbour City's elite to the core.
programme.sub-title: Contract to Kill / The Mornington Monster

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Hunt for a Killer: The Claremont Murders
programme.desc: This chilling CIA episode details the long and difficult investigation which began with the disappearance of 18-year-old secretary Sarah Spiers from a night club in the up-market Perth suburb of Claremont on Australia Day 1996.
programme.sub-title: Hunt for a Killer: The Claremont Murders

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: A Killer Amongst Us: The Norfolk Island Murder
programme.desc: On Easter Sunday 2002, on sleepy Norfolk Island in the south west Pacific, the body of 29-year-old Janelle Patton was found lying in an open field.
programme.sub-title: A Killer Amongst Us: The Norfolk Island Murder

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Girls Who Knew Too Much
programme.desc: Sallie-Anne Huckstepp and Juanita Nielsen were iconic figures in the shadowy King’s Cross scene of the 1970s and 1980s. They lived dangerous lives – challenging the status quo of the period and met with mysterious and violent deaths.
programme.sub-title: The Girls Who Knew Too Much

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters
programme.desc: Drovers Run hosts the Regional Young Farmer of the Year Award, and Becky is surprised to learn that Jake has entered. He tells her he’s going to win her back.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters
programme.desc: Tess’s upcoming operation has thoughts of mortality creeping in and Tess begins to write a letter to Charlotte so that her niece can know her should Tess no longer be around.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters
programme.desc: Tess is in a state. She is awaiting the results of her lumpectomy pathology tests, trying to put on a brave face, but clearly anxious as the moment of truth draws near.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters
programme.desc: Claire is dead and everyone is dealing with it in their own way. Tess tries to keep her emotions in check, unable to deal with her grief and burdened by survivor’s guilt. Tess’s one grasp on reality is, strangely, the appearance of Claire’s ghost.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters
programme.desc: Tess is finding it tough going with Stevie. She’s insolent and competitive and as far as Tess is concerned not a team player. When a private investigator turns up looking for Stevie, Tess is convinced she has something to hide.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters
programme.desc: Six months on from Claire’s death, Tess (Bridie Carter) has thrown herself into her work with an almost manic intensity.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters
programme.desc: Late at night Tess (Bridie Carter) is woken by a strange noise in the kitchen and discovers Stevie helping herself to a beer from the fridge. Both however are subsequently surprised by a stranger called Jack Blake.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters
programme.desc: When Harry (Marshall Napier) offers Alex (Aaron Jeffery) and Nick (Myles Pollard) a partnership deal in Killarney after he dies on the proviso that they give up Wilgul and move back home now, the boys become even more determined to save their farm.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole reminisce about their month in Altus, make amends, and say goodbye to the people they’ve come to know before returning to Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Simple Life

programme.title: The Simple Life

programme.title: The Simple Life

programme.title: The Simple Life

programme.title: The Simple Life

programme.title: The Simple Life

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Comeback Kid
programme.desc: Dog is back in Colorado chasing a young man with a taste for trouble. He's fled to Texas but with his family's house on the line Dog is willing to try a risky strategy.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Tent City
programme.desc: Today's hunt takes Dog far from the glittering hotels of Waikiki to the parts of Hawaii tourist rarely see, Oahu's ramshackle tent cities. The team searches for a woman who has lost almost everything, her home, her family and her spirit.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Dead of Night
programme.desc: Dog's good friend and fellow bondsman Chris is running out of time. He has only days to find his fugitive or risk losing his business. In his hunt Dog confronts duplicitous tipsters, vicious attack dogs, and hostile neighbors.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Best of . . .
programme.desc: The bounty-hunter adventures of Duane "Dog" Chapman and his Posse are chronicled in this one hour "Best Of" special, featuring superlative memorable moments from the previous seven seasons.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Montrose Files: The Million Dollar Man Pt. 1
programme.desc: Dog launches a high stake hunt through the desolate and dangerous mountain landscape of western Colorado in pursuit of a gun-loving survivalist with a million dollar bond on his head. Will Dog's plan of using brains over brawn work?
programme.sub-title: The Montrose Files: The Million Dollar Man Pt. 1

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Montrose Files: The Million Dollar Man Pt. 2

programme.sub-title: The Montrose Files: The Million Dollar Man Pt. 2

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Montrose Files: Round the Clock

programme.sub-title: The Montrose Files: Round the Clock

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Montrose Files: And Then There Were None
